## 4005: creation (id: 4005)

The created order, established as a sovereign decision on the part of God. The creation is dependent upon and under the authority of its Creator. Scripture affirms the role of both Jesus Christ and the Holy Spirit in the work of creation.

* **Associated Articles:** 4006: creation, origin of (ID: `4006@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4007: creation, and God (ID: `4007@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4008: creation, and Jesus Christ (ID: `4008@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4009: creation, and Holy Spirit (ID: `4009@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4010: creation, renewal of (ID: `4010@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4006: creation, origin of (id: 4006)

The free act of God based on his own wisdom and power, forming the whole natural order by his word.

God is Creator of the universe and everything in it
---------------------------------------------------

**[NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6)** *See also* [GEN 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1), [GEN 2:1](https://ref.ly/Gen2:1); [PSA 24:1–24:2](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1-Ps24:2); [PRO 8:22–8:31](https://ref.ly/Prov8:22-Prov8:31); [ECC 3:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl3:11), [ECC 11:5](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:5); [ISA 66:1–66:2](https://ref.ly/Isa66:1-Isa66:2); [JER 10:16](https://ref.ly/Jer10:16), [JER 51:19](https://ref.ly/Jer51:19); [JHN 1:3](https://ref.ly/John1:3); [ACT 4:24](https://ref.ly/Acts4:24), [ACT 7:50](https://ref.ly/Acts7:50), [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15), [ACT 17:24](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24)

### Light and darkness

**[GEN 1:3–1:5](https://ref.ly/Gen1:3-Gen1:5)** *See also* [ISA 45:7](https://ref.ly/Isa45:7)

### The heavens

**[PSA 136:5](https://ref.ly/Ps136:5)** *See also* [GEN 1:6–1:8](https://ref.ly/Gen1:6-Gen1:8); [PSA 33:6](https://ref.ly/Ps33:6), [PSA 96:5](https://ref.ly/Ps96:5); [AMO 5:8](https://ref.ly/Amos5:8); [REV 14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:7)

### The land

**[GEN 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Gen1:9-Gen1:10)** *See also* [PSA 95:5](https://ref.ly/Ps95:5), [PSA 102:25](https://ref.ly/Ps102:25), [PSA 104:5–104:6](https://ref.ly/Ps104:5-Ps104:6); [GEN 1:14](https://ref.ly/Gen1:14); [EXO 20:11](https://ref.ly/Exod20:11); [PSA 74:17](https://ref.ly/Ps74:17), [PSA 118:24](https://ref.ly/Ps118:24)

### The sea and sea creatures

**[PSA 95:5](https://ref.ly/Ps95:5)** *See also* [GEN 1:20–1:22](https://ref.ly/Gen1:20-Gen1:22)

### Birds

**[GEN 1:20–1:22](https://ref.ly/Gen1:20-Gen1:22)**

### Land animals

**[GEN 1:24–1:25](https://ref.ly/Gen1:24-Gen1:25)** *See also* [JOB 40:15](https://ref.ly/Job40:15)

### The human race

**[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)** *Genesis witnesses to order and progression in God's creative activity. The creation of Adam and Eve is not merely the end point, but the climax to the sequence.* *See also* [GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7), [GEN 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Gen2:21-Gen2:22), [GEN 5:1–5:2](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1-Gen5:2); [DEU 32:6](https://ref.ly/Deut32:6); [PSA 100:3](https://ref.ly/Ps100:3), [PSA 139:14](https://ref.ly/Ps139:14); [PRO 14:31](https://ref.ly/Prov14:31), [PRO 17:5](https://ref.ly/Prov17:5), [PRO 22:2](https://ref.ly/Prov22:2); [ECC 12:1](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:1), [ECC 12:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:7)

### The role of Jesus Christ in creation

**[JHN 1:3](https://ref.ly/John1:3)** *See also* [JHN 1:10](https://ref.ly/John1:10); [1CO 8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:6); [COL 1:16](https://ref.ly/Col1:16); [HEB 1:2](https://ref.ly/Heb1:2)

### The role of the Spirit in creation

**[JOB 33:4](https://ref.ly/Job33:4)** *See also* [GEN 1:2](https://ref.ly/Gen1:2); [PSA 104:30](https://ref.ly/Ps104:30); [ISA 40:12–40:13](https://ref.ly/Isa40:12-Isa40:13)

The creation of the world
-------------------------

**[GEN 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1)**; **[HEB 11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:3)** *See also* [PSA 33:9](https://ref.ly/Ps33:9), [PSA 148:5](https://ref.ly/Ps148:5); [ROM 4:17](https://ref.ly/Rom4:17)

The original creation was complete and perfect
----------------------------------------------

### Its completion

**[GEN 2:1](https://ref.ly/Gen2:1)** *See also* [GEN 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Gen2:2-Gen2:3); [EXO 20:11](https://ref.ly/Exod20:11); [ISA 48:12–48:13](https://ref.ly/Isa48:12-Isa48:13); [HEB 4:3](https://ref.ly/Heb4:3)

### Its perfection

**[GEN 1:31](https://ref.ly/Gen1:31)** *See also* [GEN 1:10](https://ref.ly/Gen1:10), [GEN 1:12](https://ref.ly/Gen1:12), [GEN 1:18](https://ref.ly/Gen1:18), [GEN 1:21](https://ref.ly/Gen1:21), [GEN 1:25](https://ref.ly/Gen1:25); [ECC 7:29](https://ref.ly/Eccl7:29); [ISA 45:18](https://ref.ly/Isa45:18); [1TI 4:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:4)

The witness of creation
-----------------------

### Creation should cause people to worship God

**[REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11)** *See also* [NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6); [PSA 19:1–19:4](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:4), [PSA 95:6](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6), [PSA 148:5](https://ref.ly/Ps148:5), [PSA 148:13](https://ref.ly/Ps148:13); [ROM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20) *God's power and deity is witnessed through the created order.*

### Sinners refuse the witness of creation

**[ROM 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:20)**

### Believers receive the witness of creation by faith

**[HEB 11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:3)** *See also* [GEN 6:6](https://ref.ly/Gen6:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Nehemiah 9:6; Genesis 1:1; Genesis 2:1; Psalms 24:1-2; Proverbs 8:22-31; Ecclesiastes 3:11; Ecclesiastes 11:5; Isaiah 66:1-2; Jeremiah 10:16; Jeremiah 51:19; John 1:3; Acts 4:24; Acts 7:50; Acts 14:15; Acts 17:24; Genesis 1:3-5; Isaiah 45:7; Psalms 136:5; Genesis 1:6-8; Psalms 33:6; Psalms 96:5; Amos 5:8; Revelation 14:7; Genesis 1:9-10; Psalms 95:5; Psalms 102:25; Psalms 104:5-6; Genesis 1:14; Exodus 20:11; Psalms 74:17; Psalms 118:24; Genesis 1:20-22; Genesis 1:24-25; Job 40:15; Genesis 1:26-27; Genesis 2:7; Genesis 2:21-22; Genesis 5:1-2; Deuteronomy 32:6; Psalms 100:3; Psalms 139:14; Proverbs 14:31; Proverbs 17:5; Proverbs 22:2; Ecclesiastes 12:1; Ecclesiastes 12:7; John 1:10; 1 Corinthians 8:6; Colossians 1:16; Hebrews 1:2; Job 33:4; Genesis 1:2; Psalms 104:30; Isaiah 40:12-13; Hebrews 11:3; Psalms 33:9; Psalms 148:5; Romans 4:17; Genesis 2:2-3; Isaiah 48:12-13; Hebrews 4:3; Genesis 1:31; Genesis 1:10; Genesis 1:12; Genesis 1:18; Genesis 1:21; Genesis 1:25; Ecclesiastes 7:29; Isaiah 45:18; 1 Timothy 4:4; Revelation 4:11; Psalms 19:1-4; Psalms 95:6; Psalms 148:13; Romans 1:20; Romans 1:18-20; Genesis 6:6

## 4007: creation, and God (id: 4007)

The natural world is sustained by God and speaks of God.

God sustains the creation
-------------------------

### He upholds the natural order

**[HEB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:3)** *See also* [JOB 38:33–38:37](https://ref.ly/Job38:33-Job38:37); [PSA 104:1–104:35](https://ref.ly/Ps104:1-Ps104:35), [PSA 135:6–135:7](https://ref.ly/Ps135:6-Ps135:7), [PSA 145:16–145:17](https://ref.ly/Ps145:16-Ps145:17); [MAT 10:29–10:30](https://ref.ly/Matt10:29-Matt10:30); [COL 1:17](https://ref.ly/Col1:17)

### He sustains humanity

**[ACT 17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:28)** *See also* [JOB 33:4](https://ref.ly/Job33:4); [PSA 36:6](https://ref.ly/Ps36:6); [DAN 4:34–4:35](https://ref.ly/Dan4:34-Dan4:35); [1CO 8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:6)

### Creation is upheld for the good of humanity

**[GEN 8:22](https://ref.ly/Gen8:22)** *See also* [GEN 9:12–9:16](https://ref.ly/Gen9:12-Gen9:16); [MAT 6:11](https://ref.ly/Matt6:11)

### God's sustaining power reserves the world for judgment

**[2PE 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:7)** *See also* [2PE 3:9–3:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:9-2Pet3:12) *Time is being given for sinners to repent.*

God has given humanity responsibility to preserve creation
----------------------------------------------------------

**[GEN 1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:28)** *See also* [GEN 2:15](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15), [GEN 9:1–9:3](https://ref.ly/Gen9:1-Gen9:3); [PSA 8:6–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:6-Ps8:8), [PSA 115:16](https://ref.ly/Ps115:16); [HEB 2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:8); [JAS 3:7](https://ref.ly/Jas3:7)

Creation is spoilt by sin
-------------------------

**[GEN 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17-Gen3:19)** *See also* [ROM 8:20–8:22](https://ref.ly/Rom8:20-Rom8:22); [HEB 6:8](https://ref.ly/Heb6:8)

Creation speaks of God's nature and character
---------------------------------------------

### His revelation of himself

**[JOB 12:7–12:10](https://ref.ly/Job12:7-Job12:10)** *This is not to suggest that animals can talk to human beings, rather it is a poetic device to stress what can be learnt from created things.*

### His eternal power and divine nature

**[ROM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20)** *See also* [JER 32:17](https://ref.ly/Jer32:17)

### His authority

[JOB 38:4–39:30](https://ref.ly/Job38:4-Job39:30); ; [JER 33:2](https://ref.ly/Jer33:2)

### His glory and majesty

**[PSA 19:1–19:2](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:2)** *See also* [PSA 8:1–8:9](https://ref.ly/Ps8:1-Ps8:9)

### His love and faithfulness

**[PSA 36:5](https://ref.ly/Ps36:5)** *See also* [MAT 6:30](https://ref.ly/Matt6:30)

### His power

**[ISA 40:25–40:28](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25-Isa40:28)**

### His wisdom

**[PSA 136:5](https://ref.ly/Ps136:5)** *See also* [PRO 8:27–8:29](https://ref.ly/Prov8:27-Prov8:29)

### His unchangeableness and eternity

**[PSA 102:25–102:27](https://ref.ly/Ps102:25-Ps102:27)** *See also* [PSA 90:1–90:2](https://ref.ly/Ps90:1-Ps90:2); [HEB 1:11](https://ref.ly/Heb1:11)

### His spiritual work in believers' lives

[MAT 13:3–13:43](https://ref.ly/Matt13:3-Matt13:43)

* **Associated Passages:** Hebrews 1:3; Job 38:33-37; Psalms 104:1-35; Psalms 135:6-7; Psalms 145:16-17; Matthew 10:29-30; Colossians 1:17; Acts 17:28; Job 33:4; Psalms 36:6; Daniel 4:34-35; 1 Corinthians 8:6; Genesis 8:22; Genesis 9:12-16; Matthew 6:11; 2 Peter 3:7; 2 Peter 3:9-12; Genesis 1:28; Genesis 2:15; Genesis 9:1-3; Psalms 8:6-8; Psalms 115:16; Hebrews 2:8; James 3:7; Genesis 3:17-19; Romans 8:20-22; Hebrews 6:8; Job 12:7-10; Romans 1:20; Jeremiah 32:17; Job 38:4-39:30; Jeremiah 33:2; Psalms 19:1-2; Psalms 8:1-9; Psalms 36:5; Matthew 6:30; Isaiah 40:25-28; Psalms 136:5; Proverbs 8:27-29; Psalms 102:25-27; Psalms 90:1-2; Hebrews 1:11; Matthew 13:3-43

## 4010: creation, renewal of (id: 4010)

God's creation, spoilt by sin, will one day be completely renewed. The old order will pass away and a new everlasting order established.

The renewal of creation
-----------------------

### The passing away of the old order

**[2PE 3:10–3:12](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:10-2Pet3:12)** *See also* [PSA 102:25–102:26](https://ref.ly/Ps102:25-Ps102:26); [ISA 34:4](https://ref.ly/Isa34:4), [ISA 51:6](https://ref.ly/Isa51:6); [MAT 5:18](https://ref.ly/Matt5:18), [MAT 24:35](https://ref.ly/Matt24:35); [REV 6:14](https://ref.ly/Rev6:14), [REV 21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:4)

### The expectancy of nature

**[ROM 8:19–8:22](https://ref.ly/Rom8:19-Rom8:22)** *See also* [GEN 3:17–3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:17-Gen3:19), [GEN 5:29](https://ref.ly/Gen5:29)

### Jesus Christ's destruction of all his enemies

**[1CO 15:24–15:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:24-1Cor15:28)** *See also* [PSA 110:1](https://ref.ly/Ps110:1); [ACT 2:34–2:35](https://ref.ly/Acts2:34-Acts2:35); [HEB 1:13](https://ref.ly/Heb1:13), [HEB 10:13](https://ref.ly/Heb10:13)

### The new heavens and new earth

**[REV 21:1–21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1-Rev21:2)** *See also* [ISA 65:17](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17), [ISA 66:22](https://ref.ly/Isa66:22); [ACT 3:21](https://ref.ly/Acts3:21); [HEB 11:10](https://ref.ly/Heb11:10), [HEB 11:16](https://ref.ly/Heb11:16), [HEB 12:22](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22); [2PE 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:13); [REV 3:12](https://ref.ly/Rev3:12), [REV 21:3–21:5](https://ref.ly/Rev21:3-Rev21:5), [REV 21:10](https://ref.ly/Rev21:10)

### The purity of the new creation

**[REV 21:27](https://ref.ly/Rev21:27)** *See also* [PSA 37:20](https://ref.ly/Ps37:20); [ISA 52:1](https://ref.ly/Isa52:1); [JOL 3:17](https://ref.ly/Joel3:17); [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10), [REV 22:14–22:15](https://ref.ly/Rev22:14-Rev22:15)

The creation of the new humanity
--------------------------------

### The new birth

**[2CO 5:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:17)** *See also* [JHN 3:3](https://ref.ly/John3:3), [JHN 3:5–3:8](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:8); [ROM 6:4](https://ref.ly/Rom6:4); [GAL 6:15](https://ref.ly/Gal6:15); [EPH 2:15](https://ref.ly/Eph2:15); [TIT 3:5](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5)

### Renewal in God's image

**[COL 3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:10)** *See also* [EPH 4:24](https://ref.ly/Eph4:24)

### A new heart and a new spirit

**[EZK 36:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:26)** *“new” refers to the work of the Holy Spirit in renewing Christians as they believe in Jesus Christ. This renewing will be complete in the new creation.* *See also* [PSA 51:10](https://ref.ly/Ps51:10); [JER 31:33](https://ref.ly/Jer31:33); [EZK 11:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:19), [EZK 18:31](https://ref.ly/Ezek18:31); [2CO 4:16](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16); [COL 3:1](https://ref.ly/Col3:1)

### A new mind

**[EPH 4:23](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23)** *See also* [ROM 12:1–12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:1-Rom12:2)

### A new song

**[REV 5:9–5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9-Rev5:10)** *See also* [PSA 33:3](https://ref.ly/Ps33:3), [PSA 40:3](https://ref.ly/Ps40:3), [PSA 144:9](https://ref.ly/Ps144:9), [PSA 149:1](https://ref.ly/Ps149:1); [ISA 42:10](https://ref.ly/Isa42:10); [REV 14:3](https://ref.ly/Rev14:3), [REV 15:3–15:4](https://ref.ly/Rev15:3-Rev15:4)

The future glorification of humanity
------------------------------------

### The desire for a new body

**[ROM 8:23–8:25](https://ref.ly/Rom8:23-Rom8:25)** *See also* [ROM 8:17–8:18](https://ref.ly/Rom8:17-Rom8:18); [2CO 5:1–5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:1-2Cor5:5)

### The resurrection of a new body

**[ROM 8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:11)** *See also* [JOB 19:25–19:27](https://ref.ly/Job19:25-Job19:27); [DAN 12:2–12:3](https://ref.ly/Dan12:2-Dan12:3); [JHN 5:28–5:29](https://ref.ly/John5:28-John5:29); [ACT 24:15](https://ref.ly/Acts24:15)

### The nature of the resurrection body

**[1CO 15:42–15:54](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:42-1Cor15:54)** *See also* [PHP 3:21](https://ref.ly/Phil3:21)

### The absence of sorrow and pain

**[REV 21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:4)** *See also* [ISA 25:7–25:8](https://ref.ly/Isa25:7-Isa25:8), [ISA 35:10](https://ref.ly/Isa35:10), [ISA 51:11](https://ref.ly/Isa51:11), [ISA 60:20](https://ref.ly/Isa60:20), [ISA 65:19](https://ref.ly/Isa65:19); [REV 7:17](https://ref.ly/Rev7:17)

### A new name

**[ISA 56:5](https://ref.ly/Isa56:5)** *See also* [ISA 62:2](https://ref.ly/Isa62:2), [ISA 65:15](https://ref.ly/Isa65:15); [REV 2:17](https://ref.ly/Rev2:17), [REV 3:12](https://ref.ly/Rev3:12)

### A new home

**[JHN 14:2](https://ref.ly/John14:2)** *See also* [2CO 5:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:1)

### God will dwell with his people

**[REV 21:3](https://ref.ly/Rev21:3)** *See also* [EZK 48:35](https://ref.ly/Ezek48:35); [ZEC 2:10](https://ref.ly/Zech2:10)

## 4015: life (id: 4015)

The state of being alive, characterised by vitality, growth and development.

* **Associated Articles:** 4016: life, human (ID: `4016@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4017: life, animal and plant (ID: `4017@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4018: life, spiritual (ID: `4018@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4019: life, believers' experience of (ID: `4019@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4020: life, of faith (ID: `4020@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4016: life, human (id: 4016)

Seen by Scripture as the climax of the work of creation, life is a gift of God and is to be treated with reverence and respect.

Life is from God
----------------

**[GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7)**; **[ACT 3:15](https://ref.ly/Acts3:15), [ACT 17:25](https://ref.ly/Acts17:25)** *See also* [1SA 2:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:6); [JOB 33:4](https://ref.ly/Job33:4); [PSA 139:13](https://ref.ly/Ps139:13); [DAN 5:23](https://ref.ly/Dan5:23); [ACT 17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:28); [JAS 4:14–4:15](https://ref.ly/Jas4:14-Jas4:15)

The ultimate duration of life is unknown to people
--------------------------------------------------

**[PSA 39:4](https://ref.ly/Ps39:4)** *See also* [GEN 27:2](https://ref.ly/Gen27:2); [JAS 4:13–4:14](https://ref.ly/Jas4:13-Jas4:14)

Life is precious
----------------

**[MAT 10:31](https://ref.ly/Matt10:31)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27) *Since all people are made in the image of God they are of value to him and should be so to each other*; [GEN 9:5–9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:5-Gen9:6); [PSA 49:7–49:9](https://ref.ly/Ps49:7-Ps49:9), [PSA 139:14](https://ref.ly/Ps139:14); [MAT 16:26](https://ref.ly/Matt16:26) parallel [LUK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:25)

God's presence in life
----------------------

**[DEU 30:16](https://ref.ly/Deut30:16)**; **[PSA 23:6](https://ref.ly/Ps23:6)** *See also* [PSA 71:5–71:6](https://ref.ly/Ps71:5-Ps71:6), [PSA 71:9](https://ref.ly/Ps71:9)

Life is to be lived for God
---------------------------

[ECC 12:13](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:13); ; [JER 10:23](https://ref.ly/Jer10:23); ; [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); ; [MAT 10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:39); ; [PHP 1:21](https://ref.ly/Phil1:21)

The span of human life
----------------------

**[ECC 11:8–12:8](https://ref.ly/Eccl11:8-Eccl12:8)** *See also* [PSA 90:10](https://ref.ly/Ps90:10)

### Life is temporary

**[2CO 5:1](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:1)** *See also* [PSA 49:12](https://ref.ly/Ps49:12), [PSA 103:15–103:16](https://ref.ly/Ps103:15-Ps103:16); [ISA 38:12](https://ref.ly/Isa38:12); [2PE 1:13–1:14](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:13-2Pet1:14)

### Life is short

**[1CH 29:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:15)**; **[JOB 14:1](https://ref.ly/Job14:1)**; **[JAS 4:14](https://ref.ly/Jas4:14)** *See also* [JOB 7:6–7:7](https://ref.ly/Job7:6-Job7:7), [JOB 8:9](https://ref.ly/Job8:9), [JOB 9:25](https://ref.ly/Job9:25), [JOB 14:2](https://ref.ly/Job14:2); [PSA 39:4–39:6](https://ref.ly/Ps39:4-Ps39:6), [PSA 89:47](https://ref.ly/Ps89:47), [PSA 90:12](https://ref.ly/Ps90:12), [PSA 102:11](https://ref.ly/Ps102:11), [PSA 144:4](https://ref.ly/Ps144:4); [ECC 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eccl6:12); [ISA 40:6–40:8](https://ref.ly/Isa40:6-Isa40:8)

### The termination of life by death is due to sin

**[ROM 5:12](https://ref.ly/Rom5:12)** *See also* [GEN 2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:17); [1CO 15:22](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:22)

### Examples of long life

[GEN 5:3–5:32](https://ref.ly/Gen5:3-Gen5:32), [GEN 9:29](https://ref.ly/Gen9:29), [GEN 11:10–11:32](https://ref.ly/Gen11:10-Gen11:32)

### A full span of years

**[PRO 3:16](https://ref.ly/Prov3:16)** *See also* [EXO 20:12](https://ref.ly/Exod20:12) parallel [DEU 5:16](https://ref.ly/Deut5:16); [EXO 23:25–23:26](https://ref.ly/Exod23:25-Exod23:26); [1KI 3:14](https://ref.ly/1Kgs3:14); [JOB 5:26](https://ref.ly/Job5:26); [PRO 3:2](https://ref.ly/Prov3:2), [PRO 9:11](https://ref.ly/Prov9:11), [PRO 10:27](https://ref.ly/Prov10:27)

Attitudes to life
-----------------

### Life loved

**[1PE 3:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:10)** *See also* [PSA 34:12–34:13](https://ref.ly/Ps34:12-Ps34:13); [JOB 8:21](https://ref.ly/Job8:21); [PSA 91:16](https://ref.ly/Ps91:16)

### Life despised

**[ECC 2:22–2:23](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:22-Eccl2:23)** *See also* [JOB 7:16](https://ref.ly/Job7:16), [JOB 10:1](https://ref.ly/Job10:1); [ECC 2:17](https://ref.ly/Eccl2:17); [JON 4:8](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 2:7; Acts 3:15; Acts 17:25; 1 Samuel 2:6; Job 33:4; Psalms 139:13; Daniel 5:23; Acts 17:28; James 4:14-15; Psalms 39:4; Genesis 27:2; James 4:13-14; Matthew 10:31; Genesis 1:26-27; Genesis 9:5-6; Psalms 49:7-9; Psalms 139:14; Matthew 16:26; Luke 9:25; Deuteronomy 30:16; Psalms 23:6; Psalms 71:5-6; Psalms 71:9; Ecclesiastes 12:13; Jeremiah 10:23; Micah 6:8; Matthew 10:39; Philippians 1:21; Ecclesiastes 11:8-12:8; Psalms 90:10; 2 Corinthians 5:1; Psalms 49:12; Psalms 103:15-16; Isaiah 38:12; 2 Peter 1:13-14; 1 Chronicles 29:15; Job 14:1; James 4:14; Job 7:6-7; Job 8:9; Job 9:25; Job 14:2; Psalms 39:4-6; Psalms 89:47; Psalms 90:12; Psalms 102:11; Psalms 144:4; Ecclesiastes 6:12; Isaiah 40:6-8; Romans 5:12; Genesis 2:17; 1 Corinthians 15:22; Genesis 5:3-32; Genesis 9:29; Genesis 11:10-32; Proverbs 3:16; Exodus 20:12; Deuteronomy 5:16; Exodus 23:25-26; 1 Kings 3:14; Job 5:26; Proverbs 3:2; Proverbs 9:11; Proverbs 10:27; 1 Peter 3:10; Psalms 34:12-13; Job 8:21; Psalms 91:16; Ecclesiastes 2:22-23; Job 7:16; Job 10:1; Ecclesiastes 2:17; Jonah 4:8

## 4017: life, animal and plant (id: 4017)

All living creatures and plants were made by God and are sustained by him.

Animal life
-----------

### Animals were created by God

**[GEN 2:19](https://ref.ly/Gen2:19)**; **[PSA 104:24](https://ref.ly/Ps104:24)** *See also* [GEN 1:20–1:25](https://ref.ly/Gen1:20-Gen1:25)

### Animals are cared for by God

**[PSA 145:15–145:16](https://ref.ly/Ps145:15-Ps145:16)**; **[MAT 6:26](https://ref.ly/Matt6:26)** parallel [LUK 12:24](https://ref.ly/Luke12:24) *See also* [DEU 22:7](https://ref.ly/Deut22:7); [PSA 104:10–104:12](https://ref.ly/Ps104:10-Ps104:12), [PSA 104:14](https://ref.ly/Ps104:14), [PSA 104:17–104:18](https://ref.ly/Ps104:17-Ps104:18), [PSA 104:21](https://ref.ly/Ps104:21), [PSA 104:27](https://ref.ly/Ps104:27), [PSA 136:25](https://ref.ly/Ps136:25), [PSA 147:9](https://ref.ly/Ps147:9); [JON 4:11](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:11); [MAT 10:29](https://ref.ly/Matt10:29)

### Animal life is controlled by God

**[DAN 6:22](https://ref.ly/Dan6:22)** *See also* [NUM 22:28](https://ref.ly/Num22:28); [JON 1:17](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:17); [HEB 11:33](https://ref.ly/Heb11:33)

### Animal life has been placed under human care

**[GEN 1:26](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26)** *See also* [GEN 1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:28), [GEN 2:19](https://ref.ly/Gen2:19), [GEN 9:2](https://ref.ly/Gen9:2); [PSA 8:6–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:6-Ps8:8); [DAN 2:38](https://ref.ly/Dan2:38); [HEB 2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:8); [JAS 3:7](https://ref.ly/Jas3:7)

### Animals serve human needs

[GEN 3:21](https://ref.ly/Gen3:21); ; [MAT 21:1–21:3](https://ref.ly/Matt21:1-Matt21:3) parallels [MRK 11:1–11:3](https://ref.ly/Mark11:1-Mark11:3), [LUK 19:29–19:31](https://ref.ly/Luke19:29-Luke19:31)

### Animal life saved by Noah from the flood

[GEN 6:19–6:22](https://ref.ly/Gen6:19-Gen6:22)

### Animals subsequently given to humanity for food

[GEN 9:3–9:4](https://ref.ly/Gen9:3-Gen9:4); ; [DEU 12:20–12:25](https://ref.ly/Deut12:20-Deut12:25)

### Clean and unclean animals

[GEN 7:2–7:3](https://ref.ly/Gen7:2-Gen7:3); ; [LEV 11:47](https://ref.ly/Lev11:47)

### Animals used in sacrifice

**[GEN 4:4](https://ref.ly/Gen4:4)** *See also* [GEN 8:20](https://ref.ly/Gen8:20); [LEV 17:11](https://ref.ly/Lev17:11); [HEB 9:22](https://ref.ly/Heb9:22)

### Animal life glorifies God

[PSA 148:7](https://ref.ly/Ps148:7), [PSA 150:6](https://ref.ly/Ps150:6)

Plant life
----------

### Plants were created by God

**[GEN 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gen1:11-Gen1:12)**

### Plant life is often short\-lived

**[MAT 6:30](https://ref.ly/Matt6:30)** parallel [LUK 12:28](https://ref.ly/Luke12:28) *See also* [PSA 90:5–90:6](https://ref.ly/Ps90:5-Ps90:6), [PSA 103:15–103:16](https://ref.ly/Ps103:15-Ps103:16); [ISA 37:27](https://ref.ly/Isa37:27), [ISA 51:12](https://ref.ly/Isa51:12); [1PE 1:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:24); [ISA 40:6–40:8](https://ref.ly/Isa40:6-Isa40:8)

### Plants are provided for food

**[GEN 1:29–1:30](https://ref.ly/Gen1:29-Gen1:30)** *See also* [GEN 2:16–2:17](https://ref.ly/Gen2:16-Gen2:17), [GEN 3:2](https://ref.ly/Gen3:2), [GEN 9:3](https://ref.ly/Gen9:3); [1KI 18:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:5); [JOB 28:5](https://ref.ly/Job28:5); [PSA 104:14](https://ref.ly/Ps104:14), [PSA 147:8–147:9](https://ref.ly/Ps147:8-Ps147:9); [DAN 4:32](https://ref.ly/Dan4:32); [JOL 2:22](https://ref.ly/Joel2:22)

### Plant life glorifies God

[PSA 96:12–96:13](https://ref.ly/Ps96:12-Ps96:13)

## 4018: life, spiritual (id: 4018)

Life embraces more than physical existence; it includes humanity's relationship with God. Human beings come to life spiritually only through faith in the redeeming work of God in Jesus Christ. This spiritual life is a foretaste of the life which believers will finally enjoy to the full in the new heaven and earth. Life in the Spirit means keeping in step with the promptings and guidance of the Holy Spirit, and always being open to his gifts and empowerment.

The nature of spiritual life
----------------------------

### It is new life

**[ACT 5:20](https://ref.ly/Acts5:20)** *See also* [ACT 11:18](https://ref.ly/Acts11:18); [2PE 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:3); [1JN 3:14](https://ref.ly/1John3:14)

### It is true life

**[1TI 6:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:19)**

### It is eternal life

**[ROM 5:21](https://ref.ly/Rom5:21)** *See also* [DAN 12:2](https://ref.ly/Dan12:2); [MAT 19:29](https://ref.ly/Matt19:29); [JHN 6:27](https://ref.ly/John6:27); [1JN 5:11](https://ref.ly/1John5:11), [1JN 5:20](https://ref.ly/1John5:20)

### It is abundant life

**[PSA 16:11](https://ref.ly/Ps16:11)**; **[JER 17:8](https://ref.ly/Jer17:8)** *See also* [PSA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:3); [JHN 10:10](https://ref.ly/John10:10)

The origins and nature of spiritual life
----------------------------------------

### Spiritual life is the work of the Holy Spirit

**[JHN 3:6](https://ref.ly/John3:6), [JHN 3:8](https://ref.ly/John3:8)** *See also* [EZK 36:26](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:26); [JHN 3:3](https://ref.ly/John3:3), [JHN 3:5–3:7](https://ref.ly/John3:5-John3:7); [ROM 8:11](https://ref.ly/Rom8:11); [TIT 3:5–3:7](https://ref.ly/Titus3:5-Titus3:7)

### Spiritual life unites believers to Jesus Christ

**[EPH 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Eph2:4-Eph2:5)** *See also* [ROM 6:3–6:5](https://ref.ly/Rom6:3-Rom6:5), [ROM 8:10](https://ref.ly/Rom8:10); [1CO 12:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:13); [COL 2:13](https://ref.ly/Col2:13); [1JN 5:12](https://ref.ly/1John5:12)

### Spiritual life makes believers the children of God

**[JHN 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/John1:12-John1:13)** *See also* [DEU 30:20](https://ref.ly/Deut30:20); [MAT 6:9](https://ref.ly/Matt6:9); [ROM 8:15](https://ref.ly/Rom8:15); [JAS 1:18](https://ref.ly/Jas1:18); [1JN 4:7](https://ref.ly/1John4:7), [1JN 5:1](https://ref.ly/1John5:1)

### Spiritual life brings people to know God

**[JHN 17:3](https://ref.ly/John17:3)** *See also* [MAT 11:27](https://ref.ly/Matt11:27)

### Spiritual life brings about faith

**[JHN 3:15](https://ref.ly/John3:15), [JHN 20:31](https://ref.ly/John20:31)** *See also* [JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16), [JHN 3:36](https://ref.ly/John3:36), [JHN 5:24](https://ref.ly/John5:24), [JHN 6:40](https://ref.ly/John6:40), [JHN 11:25](https://ref.ly/John11:25)

Keeping in step with the Spirit
-------------------------------

### A new way of life is made possible

**[GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25)** *See also* [ROM 8:5–8:6](https://ref.ly/Rom8:5-Rom8:6), [ROM 8:9–8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:9-Rom8:16); [GAL 5:16–5:18](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16-Gal5:18), [GAL 5:22–5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:24)

### Bondage to the written law is ended

**[ROM 2:29](https://ref.ly/Rom2:29)** *See also* [ROM 7:6](https://ref.ly/Rom7:6), [ROM 8:2](https://ref.ly/Rom8:2); [2CO 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:6); [GAL 5:17–5:18](https://ref.ly/Gal5:17-Gal5:18)

### Obedience to God is made possible

**[ROM 8:4](https://ref.ly/Rom8:4)** *See also* [EZK 36:27](https://ref.ly/Ezek36:27); [ROM 8:13](https://ref.ly/Rom8:13); [GAL 5:16](https://ref.ly/Gal5:16); [1TH 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:7-1Thess4:8)

### Deepening unity is encouraged

**[EPH 4:3](https://ref.ly/Eph4:3)** *See also* [COL 2:13](https://ref.ly/Col2:13); [PHP 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/Phil2:1-Phil2:4)

### Strength and encouragement are received

[ACT 9:31](https://ref.ly/Acts9:31)

Gifts for those living in the Spirit
------------------------------------

### Gifts are given for building up the church

**[1CO 12:4–12:11](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:4-1Cor12:11)** *See also* [ROM 12:6–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:6-Rom12:8); [1CO 12:27–12:30](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:27-1Cor12:30)

### Visions are given

[ACT 2:17](https://ref.ly/Acts2:17); ; [JOL 2:28](https://ref.ly/Joel2:28); ; [REV 1:10](https://ref.ly/Rev1:10), [REV 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Rev1:12-Rev1:13), [REV 4:2](https://ref.ly/Rev4:2), [REV 17:3](https://ref.ly/Rev17:3), [REV 21:10](https://ref.ly/Rev21:10)

### Miracles are worked

**[MAT 12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:28)** *See also* [ACT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Acts10:38); [ROM 15:19](https://ref.ly/Rom15:19); [GAL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Gal3:5)

### Ministry is enhanced

**[2CO 3:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:6)** *See also* [2CO 3:7–3:9](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:7-2Cor3:9)

Those living in the Spirit receive revelation and guidance
----------------------------------------------------------

### God is revealed as Father

**[GAL 4:6](https://ref.ly/Gal4:6)** *See also* [ROM 8:14–8:16](https://ref.ly/Rom8:14-Rom8:16)

### God's purposes are revealed

**[1CO 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:9-1Cor2:10)** *See also* [ROM 15:13](https://ref.ly/Rom15:13); [2CO 5:2–5:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:2-2Cor5:5); [GAL 5:5](https://ref.ly/Gal5:5); [EPH 1:17–1:18](https://ref.ly/Eph1:17-Eph1:18)

### Guidance is given to believers

**[ACT 8:29](https://ref.ly/Acts8:29)** *See also* [ACT 10:19](https://ref.ly/Acts10:19), [ACT 11:12](https://ref.ly/Acts11:12), [ACT 13:2](https://ref.ly/Acts13:2), [ACT 16:6–16:7](https://ref.ly/Acts16:6-Acts16:7), [ACT 20:22–20:23](https://ref.ly/Acts20:22-Acts20:23)

### Help is given to pray

[ROM 8:26–8:27](https://ref.ly/Rom8:26-Rom8:27); ; [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18); ; [JUD 1:20](https://ref.ly/Jude1:20)

The Holy Spirit sanctifies those in whom he lives
-------------------------------------------------

### Through the Spirit, Jesus Christ lives in believers

[EPH 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/Eph3:16-Eph3:17)

### The Spirit transforms believers

**[2CO 3:18](https://ref.ly/2Cor3:18)** *See also* [ROM 15:16](https://ref.ly/Rom15:16); [2TH 2:13](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:13); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2)

## 4019: life, believers' experience of (id: 4019)

God is at work in all that happens to believers, whether to warn them, to draw them to himself or to do them good.

God has a purpose in all the experiences that believers have in life
--------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ROM 8:28](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28)**; **[EPH 1:11](https://ref.ly/Eph1:11)** *See also* [GEN 21:22](https://ref.ly/Gen21:22), [GEN 28:16](https://ref.ly/Gen28:16), [GEN 39:20–39:21](https://ref.ly/Gen39:20-Gen39:21), [GEN 45:5–45:8](https://ref.ly/Gen45:5-Gen45:8); [1SA 2:6–2:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:6-1Sam2:9); [1CH 29:11–29:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:11-1Chr29:12); [JOB 42:10–42:13](https://ref.ly/Job42:10-Job42:13); [PSA 75:6–75:7](https://ref.ly/Ps75:6-Ps75:7); [ACT 17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:28); [1PE 4:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:12)

### Rejection of this conviction leads to despair

[ECC 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Eccl1:1-Eccl1:2), [ECC 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Eccl1:16-Eccl1:17)

God uses every experience in the lives of believers for good
------------------------------------------------------------

### To warn and correct

**[PSA 119:67](https://ref.ly/Ps119:67)** *See also* [GEN 12:17](https://ref.ly/Gen12:17); [2CH 7:13–7:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr7:13-2Chr7:14); [JOB 5:17](https://ref.ly/Job5:17); [ISA 38:17](https://ref.ly/Isa38:17), [ISA 48:9–48:10](https://ref.ly/Isa48:9-Isa48:10); [AMO 4:10–4:11](https://ref.ly/Amos4:10-Amos4:11); [ROM 2:4](https://ref.ly/Rom2:4); [HEB 12:5–12:11](https://ref.ly/Heb12:5-Heb12:11); [REV 9:20–9:21](https://ref.ly/Rev9:20-Rev9:21)

### To test and exercise believers' trust in God

**[DEU 8:15–8:16](https://ref.ly/Deut8:15-Deut8:16)** *See also* [EXO 15:22–15:25](https://ref.ly/Exod15:22-Exod15:25); [JDG 2:21–2:22](https://ref.ly/Judg2:21-Judg2:22); [PSA 23:1–23:6](https://ref.ly/Ps23:1-Ps23:6), [PSA 81:7](https://ref.ly/Ps81:7); [ISA 43:1–43:2](https://ref.ly/Isa43:1-Isa43:2); [NAM 1:7](https://ref.ly/Nah1:7); [ROM 8:35–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:35-Rom8:39); [PHP 4:12](https://ref.ly/Phil4:12); [HEB 11:17–11:19](https://ref.ly/Heb11:17-Heb11:19), [HEB 13:6](https://ref.ly/Heb13:6)

### To purify and prepare believers for glory

**[2CO 4:16–4:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:16-2Cor4:17)** *See also* [JOB 23:10](https://ref.ly/Job23:10); [PSA 66:10](https://ref.ly/Ps66:10); [ISA 48:10](https://ref.ly/Isa48:10); [JER 9:7](https://ref.ly/Jer9:7); [ZEC 13:8–13:9](https://ref.ly/Zech13:8-Zech13:9); [ROM 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Rom5:3-Rom5:5), [ROM 8:28–8:30](https://ref.ly/Rom8:28-Rom8:30); [1PE 1:6–1:7](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:6-1Pet1:7)

### To benefit others

[EST 4:14](https://ref.ly/Esth4:14); ; [2CO 1:3–1:6](https://ref.ly/2Cor1:3-2Cor1:6), [2CO 4:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:15); ; [PHP 1:12–1:14](https://ref.ly/Phil1:12-Phil1:14); ; [2TI 2:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:10)

In all of life's experiences believers should be thankful and trusting
----------------------------------------------------------------------

## 4020: life, of faith (id: 4020)

The way by which believers journey through this world and into the life to come. Jesus Christ himself is the way to life.

Life seen as travelling with God
--------------------------------

### Walking with God

**[GEN 17:1](https://ref.ly/Gen17:1)** *See also* [GEN 5:22](https://ref.ly/Gen5:22), [GEN 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gen5:24), [GEN 6:9](https://ref.ly/Gen6:9), [GEN 48:15](https://ref.ly/Gen48:15); [PSA 56:13](https://ref.ly/Ps56:13), [PSA 89:15](https://ref.ly/Ps89:15); [MIC 4:5](https://ref.ly/Mic4:5); [ZEC 10:12](https://ref.ly/Zech10:12)

### Journeying from the old to the new

**[ISA 43:19](https://ref.ly/Isa43:19)** *See also* [EXO 18:8](https://ref.ly/Exod18:8); [ISA 40:3–40:5](https://ref.ly/Isa40:3-Isa40:5); [MIC 2:13](https://ref.ly/Mic2:13)

### God's guidance along the way

**[EXO 13:21](https://ref.ly/Exod13:21)** *See also* [EXO 23:20](https://ref.ly/Exod23:20); [DEU 1:32–1:33](https://ref.ly/Deut1:32-Deut1:33), [DEU 8:2](https://ref.ly/Deut8:2); [NEH 9:12](https://ref.ly/Neh9:12), [NEH 9:19](https://ref.ly/Neh9:19); [PSA 25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:9); [JER 2:17](https://ref.ly/Jer2:17); [GAL 5:25](https://ref.ly/Gal5:25)

God's ways
----------

### Walking in God's way

**[ISA 35:8](https://ref.ly/Isa35:8)**; **[1JN 2:6](https://ref.ly/1John2:6)** *See also* [GEN 18:19](https://ref.ly/Gen18:19); [EXO 18:20](https://ref.ly/Exod18:20); [DEU 10:12–10:13](https://ref.ly/Deut10:12-Deut10:13), [DEU 13:5](https://ref.ly/Deut13:5), [DEU 28:9](https://ref.ly/Deut28:9); [JOS 22:5](https://ref.ly/Josh22:5); [JOB 23:10–23:12](https://ref.ly/Job23:10-Job23:12); [PSA 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Ps1:1-Ps1:2), [PSA 18:30](https://ref.ly/Ps18:30); [2TI 3:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:10)

### God teaches believers his way

**[ISA 48:17](https://ref.ly/Isa48:17)** *See also* [1SA 12:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam12:23); [1KI 8:35–8:36](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:35-1Kgs8:36) parallel [2CH 6:26–6:27](https://ref.ly/2Chr6:26-2Chr6:27); [PSA 25:8–25:9](https://ref.ly/Ps25:8-Ps25:9), [PSA 25:12](https://ref.ly/Ps25:12), [PSA 86:11](https://ref.ly/Ps86:11), [PSA 119:30](https://ref.ly/Ps119:30); [PRO 6:23](https://ref.ly/Prov6:23); [ISA 2:3](https://ref.ly/Isa2:3), [ISA 30:20–30:21](https://ref.ly/Isa30:20-Isa30:21)PSA [16:11](https://ref.ly/Isa16:11), [PSA 23:2](https://ref.ly/Ps23:2); [PRO 8:20](https://ref.ly/Prov8:20); [JER 6:16](https://ref.ly/Jer6:16); [MIC 6:8](https://ref.ly/Mic6:8); [GAL 5:22–5:23](https://ref.ly/Gal5:22-Gal5:23)

### Sinners refuse to follow God's way

**[ISA 53:6](https://ref.ly/Isa53:6)** *See also* [ISA 56:11](https://ref.ly/Isa56:11); [ACT 14:16](https://ref.ly/Acts14:16); [2PE 2:15](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:15)

### All other routes end in death

**[PRO 14:12](https://ref.ly/Prov14:12)** *See also* [DEU 11:28](https://ref.ly/Deut11:28), [DEU 31:29](https://ref.ly/Deut31:29); [JDG 2:17](https://ref.ly/Judg2:17); [2KI 21:22](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:22); [PSA 1:6](https://ref.ly/Ps1:6); [PRO 15:10](https://ref.ly/Prov15:10), [PRO 16:25](https://ref.ly/Prov16:25)

### Those who travel God's way are blessed

**[PRO 4:18](https://ref.ly/Prov4:18)** *See also* [DEU 5:33](https://ref.ly/Deut5:33); [1KI 8:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:23); [PRO 11:5](https://ref.ly/Prov11:5); [ISA 26:7–26:8](https://ref.ly/Isa26:7-Isa26:8); [MAT 5:3–5:12](https://ref.ly/Matt5:3-Matt5:12)

Jesus Christ is the way to life
-------------------------------

**[JHN 14:6](https://ref.ly/John14:6)**; **[COL 2:3](https://ref.ly/Col2:3)** *See also* [JHN 8:12](https://ref.ly/John8:12); [HEB 12:2](https://ref.ly/Heb12:2)ACT [9:2](https://ref.ly/Heb9:2), [ACT 19:9](https://ref.ly/Acts19:9), [ACT 19:23](https://ref.ly/Acts19:23), [ACT 22:4](https://ref.ly/Acts22:4), [ACT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Acts24:14), [ACT 24:22](https://ref.ly/Acts24:22)

---------------------------

### Entrance is restricted

## 4025: world, the (id: 4025)

Scripture understands “the world” in a number of senses. It initially refers to the world as God's good creation. However, that same world has now fallen into sin, with the result that it can be a threat to believers. Believers are called to live in the world, maintaining contact with it, while remaining distinct from it, and avoiding being contaminated by it.

* **Associated Articles:** 4026: world, as God's creation (ID: `4026@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4027: world, as fallen (ID: `4027@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4028: world, as redeemed (ID: `4028@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4029: world, human beings in (ID: `4029@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4030: world, human behaviour in (ID: `4030@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4026: world, as God's creation (id: 4026)

The heavens and the earth were created by God, and ordered by him and for him.

The world was created out of nothing
------------------------------------

### By the will of God

**[GEN 1:1](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1)** *See also* [PSA 96:5](https://ref.ly/Ps96:5), [PSA 102:25](https://ref.ly/Ps102:25), [PSA 148:5](https://ref.ly/Ps148:5); [ISA 40:28](https://ref.ly/Isa40:28); [HEB 11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:3); [REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11), [REV 10:6](https://ref.ly/Rev10:6)

### By the word of God

**[JHN 1:1–1:3](https://ref.ly/John1:1-John1:3)** *Jesus Christ as the eternal Word is creator of all things.* *See also* [GEN 1:3](https://ref.ly/Gen1:3); [JHN 1:10](https://ref.ly/John1:10); [1CO 8:6](https://ref.ly/1Cor8:6); [HEB 1:2](https://ref.ly/Heb1:2); [2PE 3:5](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:5)

### By the Spirit of God

**[GEN 1:2](https://ref.ly/Gen1:2)** *See also* [JOB 26:13](https://ref.ly/Job26:13), [JOB 33:4](https://ref.ly/Job33:4); [PSA 33:6](https://ref.ly/Ps33:6)

### By the hand of God

**[HEB 1:10](https://ref.ly/Heb1:10)** *See also* [PSA 8:3](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3)

### By the mind of God

**[PSA 136:5](https://ref.ly/Ps136:5)** *See also* [PSA 104:24](https://ref.ly/Ps104:24); [PRO 3:19–3:20](https://ref.ly/Prov3:19-Prov3:20)

The world God created was perfect
---------------------------------

**[GEN 1:31](https://ref.ly/Gen1:31)** *See also* [1TI 4:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:4)

God created the world for a purpose
-----------------------------------

### For his glory

**[PSA 19:1–19:2](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:2)** *See also* [PSA 50:6](https://ref.ly/Ps50:6), [PSA 148:1–148:4](https://ref.ly/Ps148:1-Ps148:4); [ROM 1:20](https://ref.ly/Rom1:20), [ROM 11:36](https://ref.ly/Rom11:36)

### That people might worship and revere him

**[PSA 147:4–147:5](https://ref.ly/Ps147:4-Ps147:5)** *See also* [GEN 15:5](https://ref.ly/Gen15:5); [NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6); [JOB 22:12](https://ref.ly/Job22:12); [ISA 40:25–40:26](https://ref.ly/Isa40:25-Isa40:26); [JER 31:35](https://ref.ly/Jer31:35)

### For his possession and use

**[DEU 10:14](https://ref.ly/Deut10:14)**; **[COL 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Col1:16-Col1:17)** *See also* [PSA 24:1–24:2](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1-Ps24:2), [PSA 50:12](https://ref.ly/Ps50:12), [PSA 89:11](https://ref.ly/Ps89:11); [ACT 7:49](https://ref.ly/Acts7:49) *God reigns within the world he has made.*

## 4027: world, as fallen (id: 4027)

The world has fallen into sin and rebellion against its Creator. As a result, it has come under the power of Satan.

The world is under the power of Satan
-------------------------------------

### He is prince of this world

**[JHN 14:30](https://ref.ly/John14:30)** *See also* [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31); [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4); [1JN 4:4](https://ref.ly/1John4:4)

### He holds the world in his grasp

**[1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19)** *See also* [EPH 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/Eph2:1-Eph2:4)

The world is opposed to God
---------------------------

### It is evil

**[JHN 7:7](https://ref.ly/John7:7)** *See also* [JHN 3:19–3:20](https://ref.ly/John3:19-John3:20); [GAL 1:4](https://ref.ly/Gal1:4); [1JN 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/1John2:15-1John2:16)

### Evil extends to the unseen world of the heavenly realms

**[EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12)**

### It is opposed to God's wisdom

**[1CO 1:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:21)** *See also* [1CO 1:25](https://ref.ly/1Cor1:25), [1CO 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:6-1Cor2:8), [1CO 3:19](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:19)

### It is opposed to the life of faith

**[JHN 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:18-John15:19)** *See also* [JHN 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/John1:10-John1:11), [JHN 17:6](https://ref.ly/John17:6), [JHN 17:9](https://ref.ly/John17:9), [JHN 17:14–17:18](https://ref.ly/John17:14-John17:18), [JHN 17:25](https://ref.ly/John17:25); [JAS 2:5](https://ref.ly/Jas2:5), [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4); [1JN 3:1](https://ref.ly/1John3:1)

### It is opposed to Jesus Christ's kingdom

**[JHN 18:36](https://ref.ly/John18:36)** *See also* [ISA 40:23](https://ref.ly/Isa40:23); [MAT 4:8–4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:8-Matt4:10) parallel [LUK 4:5–4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:5-Luke4:8); [MAT 24:14](https://ref.ly/Matt24:14); [LUK 12:30](https://ref.ly/Luke12:30); [JHN 8:23](https://ref.ly/John8:23), [JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17); [2CO 10:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:3); [HEB 11:38](https://ref.ly/Heb11:38); [1PE 2:11](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:11)

The world is under judgment
---------------------------

### It is condemned

**[1CO 11:32](https://ref.ly/1Cor11:32)** *See also* [GEN 6:5–6:7](https://ref.ly/Gen6:5-Gen6:7), [GEN 7:4](https://ref.ly/Gen7:4), [GEN 7:21](https://ref.ly/Gen7:21); [ISA 13:11](https://ref.ly/Isa13:11); [ZEP 3:8](https://ref.ly/Zeph3:8); [MAT 18:7](https://ref.ly/Matt18:7); [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11); [1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17)

### It will be judged in righteousness

**[PSA 9:8](https://ref.ly/Ps9:8)** *See also* [PSA 96:13](https://ref.ly/Ps96:13); [ISA 26:9](https://ref.ly/Isa26:9); [NAM 1:5–1:6](https://ref.ly/Nah1:5-Nah1:6); [ACT 17:31](https://ref.ly/Acts17:31); [ROM 3:19](https://ref.ly/Rom3:19)

### It will be judged by the saints

[1CO 6:2](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:2)

* **Associated Passages:** John 14:30; John 12:31; 2 Corinthians 4:4; 1 John 4:4; 1 John 5:19; Ephesians 2:1-4; John 7:7; John 3:19-20; Galatians 1:4; 1 John 2:15-16; Ephesians 6:12; 1 Corinthians 1:21; 1 Corinthians 1:25; 1 Corinthians 2:6-8; 1 Corinthians 3:19; John 15:18-19; John 1:10-11; John 17:6; John 17:9; John 17:14-18; John 17:25; James 2:5; James 4:4; 1 John 3:1; John 18:36; Isaiah 40:23; Matthew 4:8-10; Luke 4:5-8; Matthew 24:14; Luke 12:30; John 8:23; John 14:17; 2 Corinthians 10:3; Hebrews 11:38; 1 Peter 2:11; 1 Corinthians 11:32; Genesis 6:5-7; Genesis 7:4; Genesis 7:21; Isaiah 13:11; Zephaniah 3:8; Matthew 18:7; John 16:11; 1 John 2:17; Psalms 9:8; Psalms 96:13; Isaiah 26:9; Nahum 1:5-6; Acts 17:31; Romans 3:19; 1 Corinthians 6:2
* **Associated Articles:** 1075: God, justice of (ID: `1075@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 1310: God, as judge (ID: `1310@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2345: Jesus Christ, kingdom of (ID: `2345@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4120: Satan (ID: `4120@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5875: hatred (ID: `5875@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6020: sin (ID: `6020@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6124: condemnation (ID: `6124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6142: decay (ID: `6142@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8482: spiritual warfare (ID: `8482@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8734: evil (ID: `8734@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8785: opposition (ID: `8785@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9210: judgment, God's (ID: `9210@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4028: world, as redeemed (id: 4028)

Though fallen, the world is offered the hope of redemption and restoration through Jesus Christ.

This world has an end
---------------------

### It is temporary

**[1PE 1:24](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:24)** *See also* [ISA 40:6–40:7](https://ref.ly/Isa40:6-Isa40:7); [MAT 5:18](https://ref.ly/Matt5:18), [MAT 24:35](https://ref.ly/Matt24:35) parallels [MRK 13:31](https://ref.ly/Mark13:31), [LUK 21:33](https://ref.ly/Luke21:33); [1CO 7:31](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:31); [HEB 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/Heb1:10-Heb1:12), [HEB 12:26–12:27](https://ref.ly/Heb12:26-Heb12:27)

### It is under God's judgment

**[ISA 13:13](https://ref.ly/Isa13:13)** *See also* [ISA 34:4](https://ref.ly/Isa34:4), [ISA 51:6](https://ref.ly/Isa51:6); [JOL 2:30–2:31](https://ref.ly/Joel2:30-Joel2:31); [2PE 3:10](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:10); [1JN 2:17](https://ref.ly/1John2:17); [REV 20:11](https://ref.ly/Rev20:11)

Through Jesus Christ there is redemption and renewal for the world
------------------------------------------------------------------

### For humanity

**[1JN 2:2](https://ref.ly/1John2:2)** *See also* [MAT 1:21](https://ref.ly/Matt1:21); [JHN 1:29](https://ref.ly/John1:29), [JHN 3:16–3:17](https://ref.ly/John3:16-John3:17); [ROM 5:18](https://ref.ly/Rom5:18); [2CO 5:18–5:19](https://ref.ly/2Cor5:18-2Cor5:19)

### For creation

**[ROM 8:19–8:21](https://ref.ly/Rom8:19-Rom8:21)** *See also* [MAT 24:7–24:8](https://ref.ly/Matt24:7-Matt24:8) parallels [MRK 13:8](https://ref.ly/Mark13:8), [LUK 21:10–21:11](https://ref.ly/Luke21:10-Luke21:11); [COL 1:20](https://ref.ly/Col1:20)

### The promise of a new heaven and a new earth

**[2PE 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:13)** *See also* [ISA 65:17](https://ref.ly/Isa65:17); [1CO 15:24–15:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:24-1Cor15:28); [EPH 1:10](https://ref.ly/Eph1:10); [REV 21:1–21:4](https://ref.ly/Rev21:1-Rev21:4)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Peter 1:24; Isaiah 40:6-7; Matthew 5:18; Matthew 24:35; Mark 13:31; Luke 21:33; 1 Corinthians 7:31; Hebrews 1:10-12; Hebrews 12:26-27; Isaiah 13:13; Isaiah 34:4; Isaiah 51:6; Joel 2:30-31; 2 Peter 3:10; 1 John 2:17; Revelation 20:11; 1 John 2:2; Matthew 1:21; John 1:29; John 3:16-17; Romans 5:18; 2 Corinthians 5:18-19; Romans 8:19-21; Matthew 24:7-8; Mark 13:8; Luke 21:10-11; Colossians 1:20; 2 Peter 3:13; Isaiah 65:17; 1 Corinthians 15:24-28; Ephesians 1:10; Revelation 21:1-4
* **Associated Articles:** 2321: Jesus Christ, as redeemer (ID: `2321@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2324: Jesus Christ, as Saviour (ID: `2324@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4010: creation, renewal of (ID: `4010@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4809: darkness (ID: `4809@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4826: fire (ID: `4826@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5295: destruction (ID: `5295@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6510: salvation (ID: `6510@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6720: redemption (ID: `6720@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9160: new heavens and new earth (ID: `9160@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9410: heaven (ID: `9410@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4029: world, human beings in (id: 4029)

The world is intended to be the dwelling\-place of humanity, as the height of God's creation. Human beings are organised within the world into groupings and nations and have a God\-given authority to rule.

The responsibility of human beings to rule
------------------------------------------

### Over the earth

**[GEN 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15-Gen2:16)** *See also* [GEN 1:25–1:26](https://ref.ly/Gen1:25-Gen1:26), [GEN 1:29](https://ref.ly/Gen1:29); [PSA 8:4–8:6](https://ref.ly/Ps8:4-Ps8:6)

### Over the animal kingdom

**[GEN 1:28](https://ref.ly/Gen1:28)** *“subdue” and “rule” do not give liberty to exploit and abuse but responsibility for caring for and bringing the best out of God's world.* *See also* [GEN 9:1–9:5](https://ref.ly/Gen9:1-Gen9:5); [DEU 22:6–22:7](https://ref.ly/Deut22:6-Deut22:7); [PRO 27:23–27:27](https://ref.ly/Prov27:23-Prov27:27); [MAT 6:25–6:26](https://ref.ly/Matt6:25-Matt6:26); [ACT 10:11–10:13](https://ref.ly/Acts10:11-Acts10:13)

The response of human beings to God's commission to rule
--------------------------------------------------------

### Failure through abuse

**[HOS 4:2–4:3](https://ref.ly/Hos4:2-Hos4:3)** *See also* [GEN 3:12](https://ref.ly/Gen3:12), [GEN 6:11–6:12](https://ref.ly/Gen6:11-Gen6:12); [DEU 28:15–28:21](https://ref.ly/Deut28:15-Deut28:21)

### Refusal to fill the earth

**[GEN 11:5–11:7](https://ref.ly/Gen11:5-Gen11:7)** *See also* [GEN 4:17](https://ref.ly/Gen4:17)

### Obedience and blessing

**[DEU 28:4–28:5](https://ref.ly/Deut28:4-Deut28:5)** *See also* [GEN 49:25](https://ref.ly/Gen49:25)

The ordering of nations within the world
----------------------------------------

### By language

**[GEN 11:8–11:9](https://ref.ly/Gen11:8-Gen11:9)** *See also* [GEN 10:5](https://ref.ly/Gen10:5); [NEH 13:24](https://ref.ly/Neh13:24); [EST 1:22](https://ref.ly/Esth1:22); [ACT 2:6–2:8](https://ref.ly/Acts2:6-Acts2:8); [REV 14:6](https://ref.ly/Rev14:6)

### By race

**[REV 7:9](https://ref.ly/Rev7:9)** *See also* [REV 5:9](https://ref.ly/Rev5:9), [REV 13:7](https://ref.ly/Rev13:7)

### By territory

**[ACT 17:26](https://ref.ly/Acts17:26)** *See also* [GEN 13:11–13:12](https://ref.ly/Gen13:11-Gen13:12); [NUM 13:27–13:29](https://ref.ly/Num13:27-Num13:29)

### By their rise and fall

**[JER 18:7–18:10](https://ref.ly/Jer18:7-Jer18:10)** *See also* [2CH 15:6](https://ref.ly/2Chr15:6); [ISA 19:2](https://ref.ly/Isa19:2); [JER 1:10](https://ref.ly/Jer1:10); [DAN 7:17–7:18](https://ref.ly/Dan7:17-Dan7:18); [MAT 24:7](https://ref.ly/Matt24:7) parallels [MRK 13:8](https://ref.ly/Mark13:8), [LUK 21:10–21:11](https://ref.ly/Luke21:10-Luke21:11)

### By government

**[ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1)** *See also* [DAN 2:21](https://ref.ly/Dan2:21), [DAN 4:17](https://ref.ly/Dan4:17); [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

The world as the object of the gospel proclamation
--------------------------------------------------

### God sent Jesus Christ to this world

**[JHN 3:16](https://ref.ly/John3:16)** *See also* [ISA 45:22](https://ref.ly/Isa45:22); [JHN 1:10](https://ref.ly/John1:10), [JHN 1:29](https://ref.ly/John1:29); [1JN 2:2](https://ref.ly/1John2:2), [1JN 4:9](https://ref.ly/1John4:9)

### Believers are commanded to evangelise this world

**[MAT 28:18–28:19](https://ref.ly/Matt28:18-Matt28:19)** *See also* [MRK 16:15](https://ref.ly/Mark16:15); [LUK 24:46–24:47](https://ref.ly/Luke24:46-Luke24:47); [ACT 1:8](https://ref.ly/Acts1:8)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 2:15-16; Genesis 1:25-26; Genesis 1:29; Psalms 8:4-6; Genesis 1:28; Genesis 9:1-5; Deuteronomy 22:6-7; Proverbs 27:23-27; Matthew 6:25-26; Acts 10:11-13; Hosea 4:2-3; Genesis 3:12; Genesis 6:11-12; Deuteronomy 28:15-21; Genesis 11:5-7; Genesis 4:17; Deuteronomy 28:4-5; Genesis 49:25; Genesis 11:8-9; Genesis 10:5; Nehemiah 13:24; Esther 1:22; Acts 2:6-8; Revelation 14:6; Revelation 7:9; Revelation 5:9; Revelation 13:7; Acts 17:26; Genesis 13:11-12; Numbers 13:27-29; Jeremiah 18:7-10; 2 Chronicles 15:6; Isaiah 19:2; Jeremiah 1:10; Daniel 7:17-18; Matthew 24:7; Mark 13:8; Luke 21:10-11; Romans 13:1; Daniel 2:21; Daniel 4:17; 1 Peter 2:13-14; John 3:16; Isaiah 45:22; John 1:10; John 1:29; 1 John 2:2; 1 John 4:9; Matthew 28:18-19; Mark 16:15; Luke 24:46-47; Acts 1:8
* **Associated Articles:** 2354: Jesus Christ, mission of (ID: `2354@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2420: gospel (ID: `2420@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3296: Holy Spirit, work in the world (ID: `3296@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5001: human race, the (ID: `5001@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5051: responsibility (ID: `5051@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5080: Adam (ID: `5080@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5326: government (ID: `5326@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5367: kingdoms (ID: `5367@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5374: languages (ID: `5374@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5475: property (ID: `5475@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5540: society (ID: `5540@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8424: evangelism (ID: `8424@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4030: world, human behaviour in (id: 4030)

Human behaviour in the world is now characterised by self\-centredness as a result of sin. Believers are called upon to renounce such sinful behaviour.

Human passion in the world is expressed in various ways
-------------------------------------------------------

### In physical desires

**[1JN 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/1John2:15-1John2:16)** *See also* [EXO 20:17](https://ref.ly/Exod20:17); [PRO 27:20](https://ref.ly/Prov27:20); [LUK 12:15](https://ref.ly/Luke12:15), [LUK 21:34](https://ref.ly/Luke21:34); [JAS 4:4](https://ref.ly/Jas4:4); [2PE 2:18–2:20](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:18-2Pet2:20)

### In indulgence

**[JAS 5:1](https://ref.ly/Jas5:1), [JAS 5:5](https://ref.ly/Jas5:5)** *See also* [JOB 21:7–21:13](https://ref.ly/Job21:7-Job21:13); [PSA 73:2–73:3](https://ref.ly/Ps73:2-Ps73:3); [2TI 4:10](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:10)

### In intellectual pursuits

**[COL 2:8](https://ref.ly/Col2:8)** *See also* [GAL 4:3–4:5](https://ref.ly/Gal4:3-Gal4:5); [EPH 2:3](https://ref.ly/Eph2:3)

### In a weak will

**[EXO 23:2](https://ref.ly/Exod23:2)** *See also* [JOB 31:34](https://ref.ly/Job31:34); [ROM 6:17–6:19](https://ref.ly/Rom6:17-Rom6:19)

Though remaining in the world, believers are not of the world
-------------------------------------------------------------

[JHN 17:6–17:19](https://ref.ly/John17:6-John17:19)

Believers are to renounce the passions of the world
---------------------------------------------------

### Through a renewed mind

**[ROM 12:2](https://ref.ly/Rom12:2)** *See also* [GAL 1:4](https://ref.ly/Gal1:4); [EPH 4:23](https://ref.ly/Eph4:23); [COL 3:5–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:5-Col3:10)

### Through obedience

**[1PE 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:14-1Pet1:15)** *See also* [2CO 10:2–10:5](https://ref.ly/2Cor10:2-2Cor10:5); [GAL 5:24](https://ref.ly/Gal5:24), [GAL 6:15](https://ref.ly/Gal6:15); [EPH 5:17](https://ref.ly/Eph5:17); [TIT 2:12](https://ref.ly/Titus2:12); [JAS 1:27](https://ref.ly/Jas1:27); [2PE 1:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:4)

### Through having spiritual priorities

**[LUK 12:29–12:31](https://ref.ly/Luke12:29-Luke12:31)** parallel [MAT 6:31–6:33](https://ref.ly/Matt6:31-Matt6:33) *See also* [MAT 10:39](https://ref.ly/Matt10:39); [LUK 14:26–14:27](https://ref.ly/Luke14:26-Luke14:27), [LUK 17:33](https://ref.ly/Luke17:33); [JHN 12:24–12:26](https://ref.ly/John12:24-John12:26); [1TI 6:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:6)

### Through growing to maturity

**[1CO 3:1](https://ref.ly/1Cor3:1)** *See also* [HEB 5:12](https://ref.ly/Heb5:12), [HEB 6:1–6:3](https://ref.ly/Heb6:1-Heb6:3)

The futility of worldly pursuits
--------------------------------

### They bring no lasting material gain

**[1TI 6:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:7)** *See also* [JOB 1:21](https://ref.ly/Job1:21); [PSA 49:17](https://ref.ly/Ps49:17); [ECC 5:15](https://ref.ly/Eccl5:15); [1TI 6:17–6:19](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:17-1Tim6:19)

### They bring no spiritual gain

**[MRK 8:36–8:37](https://ref.ly/Mark8:36-Mark8:37)** parallel [LUK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Luke9:25) *See also* [JOB 20:4–20:5](https://ref.ly/Job20:4-Job20:5); [PSA 17:14](https://ref.ly/Ps17:14); [LUK 16:25–16:26](https://ref.ly/Luke16:25-Luke16:26)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 John 2:15-16; Exodus 20:17; Proverbs 27:20; Luke 12:15; Luke 21:34; James 4:4; 2 Peter 2:18-20; James 5:1; James 5:5; Job 21:7-13; Psalms 73:2-3; 2 Timothy 4:10; Colossians 2:8; Galatians 4:3-5; Ephesians 2:3; Exodus 23:2; Job 31:34; Romans 6:17-19; John 17:6-19; Romans 12:2; Galatians 1:4; Ephesians 4:23; Colossians 3:5-10; 1 Peter 1:14-15; 2 Corinthians 10:2-5; Galatians 5:24; Galatians 6:15; Ephesians 5:17; Titus 2:12; James 1:27; 2 Peter 1:4; Luke 12:29-31; Matthew 6:31-33; Matthew 10:39; Luke 14:26-27; Luke 17:33; John 12:24-26; 1 Timothy 6:6; 1 Corinthians 3:1; Hebrews 5:12; Hebrews 6:1-3; 1 Timothy 6:7; Job 1:21; Psalms 49:17; Ecclesiastes 5:15; 1 Timothy 6:17-19; Mark 8:36-37; Luke 9:25; Job 20:4-5; Psalms 17:14; Luke 16:25-26

## 4035: abundance (id: 4035)

A state of plenty. Since Israel was often restricted in resources, abundance was an important feature of her future hope, and became a symbol of spiritual well\-being.

Examples of material abundance
------------------------------

### Rain

**[DEU 32:2](https://ref.ly/Deut32:2)** *See also* [1KI 18:41](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:41), [1KI 18:45](https://ref.ly/1Kgs18:45); [JOB 36:28](https://ref.ly/Job36:28); [PSA 68:9](https://ref.ly/Ps68:9); [JOL 2:23](https://ref.ly/Joel2:23)

### Water, streams and rivers

**[PSA 78:20](https://ref.ly/Ps78:20)** *See also* [NUM 24:7](https://ref.ly/Num24:7); [2CH 32:4](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:4); [PSA 1:3](https://ref.ly/Ps1:3); [ISA 44:4](https://ref.ly/Isa44:4); [EZK 47:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek47:5)

### Luxuriant growth and fruitfulness

**[EZK 47:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek47:12)** *See also* [EZK 19:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek19:10), [EZK 31:2–31:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek31:2-Ezek31:9); [DAN 4:12](https://ref.ly/Dan4:12), [DAN 4:21](https://ref.ly/Dan4:21); [REV 22:2](https://ref.ly/Rev22:2)

### Spaciousness

**[PSA 31:8](https://ref.ly/Ps31:8)** *See also* [GEN 26:22](https://ref.ly/Gen26:22); [PSA 66:12](https://ref.ly/Ps66:12)

### Wealth and possessions

**[GEN 24:35](https://ref.ly/Gen24:35)** *See also* [GEN 30:43](https://ref.ly/Gen30:43), [GEN 36:7](https://ref.ly/Gen36:7); [2SA 19:32](https://ref.ly/2Sam19:32); [2CH 1:15](https://ref.ly/2Chr1:15), [2CH 9:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr9:22); [JOB 1:3](https://ref.ly/Job1:3)

### Canaan

**[EXO 3:8](https://ref.ly/Exod3:8)** *See also* [NUM 13:27](https://ref.ly/Num13:27); [DEU 8:8](https://ref.ly/Deut8:8); [JER 2:7](https://ref.ly/Jer2:7)

Material abundance a reward for obedience
-----------------------------------------

**[LEV 26:5](https://ref.ly/Lev26:5)** *See also* [DEU 30:9](https://ref.ly/Deut30:9); [JOB 42:12](https://ref.ly/Job42:12); [PSA 132:15](https://ref.ly/Ps132:15)

### Obedience not always rewarded in this way

[JOB 1:12](https://ref.ly/Job1:12), [JOB 2:6](https://ref.ly/Job2:6); ; [PHP 4:12](https://ref.ly/Phil4:12)

Examples of spiritual abundance
-------------------------------

### The abundance of divine power

[DEU 9:26](https://ref.ly/Deut9:26); ; [PSA 93:4](https://ref.ly/Ps93:4); ; [JOL 2:29–2:32](https://ref.ly/Joel2:29-Joel2:32); ; [EPH 1:18–1:20](https://ref.ly/Eph1:18-Eph1:20), [EPH 3:20](https://ref.ly/Eph3:20)

### The abundance of divine grace

### The abundance of human thanksgiving

**[2CO 4:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:15)** *See also* [PSA 119:171](https://ref.ly/Ps119:171)

### The abundance of God's future blessing

**[2CO 4:17](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:17)** *See also* [PSA 36:8](https://ref.ly/Ps36:8); [ISA 64:4](https://ref.ly/Isa64:4); [JHN 10:10](https://ref.ly/John10:10); [1CO 2:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:9); [2PE 1:11](https://ref.ly/2Pet1:11); [REV 14:3](https://ref.ly/Rev14:3)

## 4040: beauty (id: 4040)

A physical or spiritual quality which brings pleasure to those who behold it. Scripture stresses the beauty of God himself and his creation, while noting that the beauty of the creation can lead away from God or become idolised.

Beauty in nature
----------------

**[JOB 38:31](https://ref.ly/Job38:31)**; **[ECC 3:11](https://ref.ly/Eccl3:11)** *See also* [GEN 49:21](https://ref.ly/Gen49:21); [EZK 20:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek20:6), [EZK 31:7–31:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek31:7-Ezek31:9)

Beautiful people
----------------

### Women

**[GEN 29:17](https://ref.ly/Gen29:17)**; **[EST 1:11](https://ref.ly/Esth1:11)** *See also* [GEN 6:2](https://ref.ly/Gen6:2), [GEN 12:11](https://ref.ly/Gen12:11), [GEN 12:14](https://ref.ly/Gen12:14), [GEN 24:15–24:16](https://ref.ly/Gen24:15-Gen24:16), [GEN 26:7](https://ref.ly/Gen26:7); [DEU 21:11](https://ref.ly/Deut21:11); [1SA 25:3](https://ref.ly/1Sam25:3); [2SA 13:1](https://ref.ly/2Sam13:1), [2SA 14:27](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:27); [1KI 1:3–1:4](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:3-1Kgs1:4)EST [2:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs2:7), [EST 2:17](https://ref.ly/Esth2:17)[JOB 42:15](https://ref.ly/Job42:15); [PSA 45:11](https://ref.ly/Ps45:11); [SNG 2:14](https://ref.ly/Song2:14), [SNG 4:7](https://ref.ly/Song4:7), [SNG 7:1](https://ref.ly/Song7:1)

### Men

**[GEN 39:6](https://ref.ly/Gen39:6)** *See also* [1SA 16:12](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:12), [1SA 17:42](https://ref.ly/1Sam17:42); [2SA 14:25](https://ref.ly/2Sam14:25); [1KI 1:6](https://ref.ly/1Kgs1:6); [SNG 1:16](https://ref.ly/Song1:16), [SNG 5:10](https://ref.ly/Song5:10); [EZK 23:6](https://ref.ly/Ezek23:6), [EZK 23:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek23:23)

### An enhanced quality

**[EST 2:2–2:3](https://ref.ly/Esth2:2-Esth2:3)** *See also* [EST 2:9](https://ref.ly/Esth2:9), [EST 2:12](https://ref.ly/Esth2:12); [ISA 3:24](https://ref.ly/Isa3:24); [EZK 7:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek7:20)

### Beauty and lack of beauty as external impressions

**[ISA 53:2](https://ref.ly/Isa53:2)** *See also* [PRO 11:22](https://ref.ly/Prov11:22), [PRO 31:30](https://ref.ly/Prov31:30); [1PE 3:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:3)

### May lead to pride and lust

**[PRO 6:25–6:26](https://ref.ly/Prov6:25-Prov6:26)**; **[EZK 28:17](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:17)** *See also* [GEN 12:11–12:12](https://ref.ly/Gen12:11-Gen12:12), [GEN 39:7](https://ref.ly/Gen39:7); [2SA 11:2–11:4](https://ref.ly/2Sam11:2-2Sam11:4); [EZK 23:12](https://ref.ly/Ezek23:12)

Beautiful artefacts
-------------------

**[LUK 21:5](https://ref.ly/Luke21:5)** *See also* [JOS 7:21](https://ref.ly/Josh7:21); [EZK 27:3–27:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:3-Ezek27:4), [EZK 27:11](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:11), [EZK 27:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:24); [ACT 3:2](https://ref.ly/Acts3:2)

The beauty of Jerusalem
-----------------------

**[PSA 50:2](https://ref.ly/Ps50:2)** *See also* [PSA 48:2](https://ref.ly/Ps48:2); [JER 6:2](https://ref.ly/Jer6:2); [LAM 2:15](https://ref.ly/Lam2:15); [EZK 16:10–16:15](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:10-Ezek16:15), [EZK 16:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek16:25); [DAN 11:45](https://ref.ly/Dan11:45); [REV 21:2](https://ref.ly/Rev21:2)

The beauty of God as the joy of believers
-----------------------------------------

**[PSA 27:4](https://ref.ly/Ps27:4)** *See also* [1CH 16:29](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:29); [PSA 29:2](https://ref.ly/Ps29:2); [ISA 4:2](https://ref.ly/Isa4:2), [ISA 28:5](https://ref.ly/Isa28:5), [ISA 33:17](https://ref.ly/Isa33:17), [ISA 52:7](https://ref.ly/Isa52:7), [ISA 61:3](https://ref.ly/Isa61:3); [JER 11:16](https://ref.ly/Jer11:16); [ROM 10:15](https://ref.ly/Rom10:15)

## 4045: chaos (id: 4045)

A state of complete disorder or confusion. The first stage of creation where, having brought something out of nothing, God had not yet brought order to the universe. This primeval chaos, often symbolised by surging waters, threatens to disrupt God's order at any time. God sometimes allows a return to chaos as judgment.

God creates order out of chaos
------------------------------

### God creates something out of nothing

**[GEN 1:1–1:2](https://ref.ly/Gen1:1-Gen1:2)** *See also* [PSA 33:9](https://ref.ly/Ps33:9), [PSA 148:5–148:6](https://ref.ly/Ps148:5-Ps148:6); [ROM 4:17](https://ref.ly/Rom4:17); [HEB 11:3](https://ref.ly/Heb11:3)

### God brings order to his creation

**[ISA 45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:12)** *See also* [GEN 1:14–1:19](https://ref.ly/Gen1:14-Gen1:19); [JOB 9:8](https://ref.ly/Job9:8); [PSA 8:3](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3); [ISA 48:13](https://ref.ly/Isa48:13)

Chaos threatens God's order
---------------------------

### Life and order in creation must be sustained by God

**[PSA 104:29](https://ref.ly/Ps104:29)**; **[COL 1:16–1:17](https://ref.ly/Col1:16-Col1:17)** *See also* [JOB 12:10](https://ref.ly/Job12:10), [JOB 34:14–34:15](https://ref.ly/Job34:14-Job34:15); [ISA 42:5](https://ref.ly/Isa42:5); [HEB 1:2–1:3](https://ref.ly/Heb1:2-Heb1:3)

### The raging sea as a symbol of chaos

**[PSA 46:2–46:3](https://ref.ly/Ps46:2-Ps46:3)** *The raging sea is a frequent symbol of the chaos from which the world was created and to which it could return. Yet those whose confidence is in the God who brought order out of chaos have nothing to fear*; **[PSA 104:7–104:9](https://ref.ly/Ps104:7-Ps104:9)** *See also* [EXO 15:8](https://ref.ly/Exod15:8); [PSA 69:2](https://ref.ly/Ps69:2), [PSA 69:15](https://ref.ly/Ps69:15), [PSA 77:16](https://ref.ly/Ps77:16); [PRO 8:29](https://ref.ly/Prov8:29); [ZEC 10:11](https://ref.ly/Zech10:11); [MAT 8:23–8:27](https://ref.ly/Matt8:23-Matt8:27) parallels [MRK 4:36–4:41](https://ref.ly/Mark4:36-Mark4:41), [LUK 8:22–8:25](https://ref.ly/Luke8:22-Luke8:25)

### Threatening nations are likened to the raging seas as bringers of chaos

**[ISA 17:12–17:13](https://ref.ly/Isa17:12-Isa17:13)** *See also* [PSA 46:6](https://ref.ly/Ps46:6); [JER 46:7](https://ref.ly/Jer46:7)

### Spiritual and political chaos

**[JDG 17:6](https://ref.ly/Judg17:6)** *A period of anarchy, when no spiritual or political authority was recognised in Israel*; **[EPH 4:14](https://ref.ly/Eph4:14)** *See also* [GAL 1:7](https://ref.ly/Gal1:7)

God uses chaos as a judgment
----------------------------

**[ISA 34:11](https://ref.ly/Isa34:11)** *See also* [ISA 24:1](https://ref.ly/Isa24:1), [ISA 24:3–24:4](https://ref.ly/Isa24:3-Isa24:4), [ISA 24:10–24:12](https://ref.ly/Isa24:10-Isa24:12), [ISA 24:17–24:21](https://ref.ly/Isa24:17-Isa24:21), [ISA 27:10](https://ref.ly/Isa27:10), [ISA 32:14](https://ref.ly/Isa32:14); [ZEP 1:14–1:15](https://ref.ly/Zeph1:14-Zeph1:15); [REV 6:15–6:17](https://ref.ly/Rev6:15-Rev6:17)

### Floodwaters as a symbol of the chaos of judgment

**[JON 2:3](https://ref.ly/Jonah2:3)** *See also* [GEN 6:17](https://ref.ly/Gen6:17); [JOB 20:28](https://ref.ly/Job20:28), [JOB 22:16](https://ref.ly/Job22:16); [ISA 8:7](https://ref.ly/Isa8:7)

### Panic and destruction characterise the chaos that follows judgment

**[ZEC 14:13](https://ref.ly/Zech14:13)** *See also* [JDG 7:22](https://ref.ly/Judg7:22); [1SA 14:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam14:20); [2CH 20:22–20:23](https://ref.ly/2Chr20:22-2Chr20:23); [ISA 19:2](https://ref.ly/Isa19:2); [EZK 38:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek38:21); [HAG 2:22](https://ref.ly/Hag2:22)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 1:1-2; Psalms 33:9; Psalms 148:5-6; Romans 4:17; Hebrews 11:3; Isaiah 45:12; Genesis 1:14-19; Job 9:8; Psalms 8:3; Isaiah 48:13; Psalms 104:29; Colossians 1:16-17; Job 12:10; Job 34:14-15; Isaiah 42:5; Hebrews 1:2-3; Psalms 46:2-3; Psalms 104:7-9; Exodus 15:8; Psalms 69:2; Psalms 69:15; Psalms 77:16; Proverbs 8:29; Zechariah 10:11; Matthew 8:23-27; Mark 4:36-41; Luke 8:22-25; Isaiah 17:12-13; Psalms 46:6; Jeremiah 46:7; Judges 17:6; Ephesians 4:14; Galatians 1:7; Isaiah 34:11; Isaiah 24:1; Isaiah 24:3-4; Isaiah 24:10-12; Isaiah 24:17-21; Isaiah 27:10; Isaiah 32:14; Zephaniah 1:14-15; Revelation 6:15-17; Jonah 2:3; Genesis 6:17; Job 20:28; Job 22:16; Isaiah 8:7; Zechariah 14:13; Judges 7:22; 1 Samuel 14:20; 2 Chronicles 20:22-23; Isaiah 19:2; Ezekiel 38:21; Haggai 2:22

## 4050: dust (id: 4050)

Human beings were created from the dust by God and will return to it at death. Dust is therefore taken as a symbol of poverty, lowliness and humility. In Scripture dust is shaken off the feet to warn of future judgment, and is also used as a means of expressing grief.

Human beings were created from the dust by God
----------------------------------------------

**[GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7)** *See also* [GEN 18:27](https://ref.ly/Gen18:27); [PSA 103:14](https://ref.ly/Ps103:14); [1CO 15:47](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:47)

We will all return to dust when we die
--------------------------------------

**[GEN 3:19](https://ref.ly/Gen3:19)** *God's curse upon Adam affected all humanity*; **[PSA 90:3](https://ref.ly/Ps90:3)** *See also* [JOB 10:9](https://ref.ly/Job10:9), [JOB 34:15](https://ref.ly/Job34:15); [ECC 12:7](https://ref.ly/Eccl12:7)

Dust as a symbol of poverty, lowliness and humility
---------------------------------------------------

**[1SA 2:8](https://ref.ly/1Sam2:8)** *See also* [GEN 18:27](https://ref.ly/Gen18:27); [1KI 16:2](https://ref.ly/1Kgs16:2); [JOB 30:19](https://ref.ly/Job30:19)

Dust as a simile for a multitude
--------------------------------

**[GEN 13:16](https://ref.ly/Gen13:16)** *See also* [GEN 28:14](https://ref.ly/Gen28:14); [PSA 78:27](https://ref.ly/Ps78:27)

Dust is shaken off the feet as a warning of judgment
----------------------------------------------------

**[MRK 6:11](https://ref.ly/Mark6:11)** parallels [MAT 10:14](https://ref.ly/Matt10:14), [LUK 9:5](https://ref.ly/Luke9:5) *See also* [LUK 10:10–10:11](https://ref.ly/Luke10:10-Luke10:11); [ACT 13:51](https://ref.ly/Acts13:51)

Dust is used in expressing grief and repentance
-----------------------------------------------

**[JOB 42:5–42:6](https://ref.ly/Job42:5-Job42:6)**; **[LAM 2:10](https://ref.ly/Lam2:10)** *See also* [JOS 7:6](https://ref.ly/Josh7:6); [JOB 2:12](https://ref.ly/Job2:12); [EZK 27:30](https://ref.ly/Ezek27:30); [REV 18:19](https://ref.ly/Rev18:19)

## 4055: heaven and earth (id: 4055)

An expression which in the original Hebrew refers to the whole of creation. It is frequently used in relation to God both as Creator and Lord in order to emphasise his power and authority.

Heaven and earth in relation to God
-----------------------------------

### He is the Creator of heaven and earth

**[ISA 37:16](https://ref.ly/Isa37:16)** parallel [2KI 19:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:15) *See also* [GEN 14:18–14:23](https://ref.ly/Gen14:18-Gen14:23); [2CH 2:12](https://ref.ly/2Chr2:12); [PSA 115:15](https://ref.ly/Ps115:15), [PSA 121:2](https://ref.ly/Ps121:2), [PSA 124:8](https://ref.ly/Ps124:8), [PSA 134:3](https://ref.ly/Ps134:3), [PSA 146:5–146:6](https://ref.ly/Ps146:5-Ps146:6); [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15), [ACT 17:24](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24)

### He is Lord of heaven and earth

**[MAT 11:25](https://ref.ly/Matt11:25)** parallel [LUK 10:21](https://ref.ly/Luke10:21) *See also* [1CH 29:11–29:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr29:11-1Chr29:12); [EZR 5:11](https://ref.ly/Ezra5:11); [JER 23:23–23:24](https://ref.ly/Jer23:23-Jer23:24), [JER 33:25–33:26](https://ref.ly/Jer33:25-Jer33:26)

The personification of heaven and earth
---------------------------------------

**[DEU 31:28](https://ref.ly/Deut31:28)** *See also* [DEU 4:26](https://ref.ly/Deut4:26), [DEU 30:19](https://ref.ly/Deut30:19); [PSA 69:34](https://ref.ly/Ps69:34); [JER 51:48](https://ref.ly/Jer51:48)

Allusions to the end of heaven and earth
----------------------------------------

**[MAT 24:35](https://ref.ly/Matt24:35)** parallels [MRK 13:31](https://ref.ly/Mark13:31), [LUK 21:33](https://ref.ly/Luke21:33) *See also* [MAT 5:18](https://ref.ly/Matt5:18); [LUK 16:17](https://ref.ly/Luke16:17)

The expression \`\`between heaven and earth''
---------------------------------------------

**[1CH 21:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:16)** *See also* [ZEC 5:9](https://ref.ly/Zech5:9)

* **Associated Passages:** Isaiah 37:16; 2 Kings 19:15; Genesis 14:18-23; 2 Chronicles 2:12; Psalms 115:15; Psalms 121:2; Psalms 124:8; Psalms 134:3; Psalms 146:5-6; Acts 14:15; Acts 17:24; Matthew 11:25; Luke 10:21; 1 Chronicles 29:11-12; Ezra 5:11; Jeremiah 23:23-24; Jeremiah 33:25-26; Deuteronomy 31:28; Deuteronomy 4:26; Deuteronomy 30:19; Psalms 69:34; Jeremiah 51:48; Matthew 24:35; Mark 13:31; Luke 21:33; Matthew 5:18; Luke 16:17; 1 Chronicles 21:16; Zechariah 5:9

## 4060: nature (id: 4060)

God's creation, often with special reference to plant and animal life.

Nature is God's creation
------------------------

**[PSA 89:11](https://ref.ly/Ps89:11)** *See also* [ISA 45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:12); [JER 27:5](https://ref.ly/Jer27:5); [ACT 4:24](https://ref.ly/Acts4:24), [ACT 14:15](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15), [ACT 17:24](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24); [REV 4:11](https://ref.ly/Rev4:11), [REV 10:6](https://ref.ly/Rev10:6)

### Plants

**[GEN 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Gen1:11-Gen1:12)** *See also* [GEN 2:4–2:9](https://ref.ly/Gen2:4-Gen2:9); [PSA 104:14–104:16](https://ref.ly/Ps104:14-Ps104:16)

### Land and sea

**[PSA 24:1](https://ref.ly/Ps24:1)** *See also* [GEN 1:9–1:10](https://ref.ly/Gen1:9-Gen1:10); [JOB 38:4–38:11](https://ref.ly/Job38:4-Job38:11); [ISA 40:12](https://ref.ly/Isa40:12); [AMO 5:8](https://ref.ly/Amos5:8); [JON 1:9](https://ref.ly/Jonah1:9)

### The sun, moon and stars

**[JOB 9:9](https://ref.ly/Job9:9)** *See also* [GEN 1:14–1:18](https://ref.ly/Gen1:14-Gen1:18); [PSA 8:3](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3), [PSA 148:3–148:5](https://ref.ly/Ps148:3-Ps148:5); [JER 31:35](https://ref.ly/Jer31:35)

### Animals

**[GEN 1:20–1:22](https://ref.ly/Gen1:20-Gen1:22)** *See also* [JOB 12:7–12:10](https://ref.ly/Job12:7-Job12:10); [PSA 104:25](https://ref.ly/Ps104:25)

### Human beings

**[EXO 4:11](https://ref.ly/Exod4:11)**; **[ISA 45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:12)** [GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27), [GEN 2:7](https://ref.ly/Gen2:7); [PSA 95:6](https://ref.ly/Ps95:6), [PSA 100:3](https://ref.ly/Ps100:3); ; [PRO 22:2](https://ref.ly/Prov22:2); ; [JER 27:5](https://ref.ly/Jer27:5)

The distinction between humanity and the rest of nature
-------------------------------------------------------

### God created human beings alone in his image

**[GEN 1:26–1:27](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:27)**; **[COL 3:9–3:10](https://ref.ly/Col3:9-Col3:10)** *See also* [GEN 5:1](https://ref.ly/Gen5:1), [GEN 9:6](https://ref.ly/Gen9:6); [JAS 3:9](https://ref.ly/Jas3:9)

### Humanity is the steward of nature

**[PSA 115:16](https://ref.ly/Ps115:16)** *See also* [GEN 1:26–1:30](https://ref.ly/Gen1:26-Gen1:30), [GEN 2:15](https://ref.ly/Gen2:15); [PSA 8:5–8:8](https://ref.ly/Ps8:5-Ps8:8)

God is active in nature
-----------------------

### In sustaining nature

**[MAT 10:29](https://ref.ly/Matt10:29)** parallel [LUK 12:6](https://ref.ly/Luke12:6) *See also* [PSA 147:1–147:17](https://ref.ly/Ps147:1-Ps147:17); [ACT 17:24–17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24-Acts17:28); [COL 1:17](https://ref.ly/Col1:17); [HEB 2:10](https://ref.ly/Heb2:10)

### In providing for plant life

**[LEV 26:4](https://ref.ly/Lev26:4)**; **[MAT 6:28–6:29](https://ref.ly/Matt6:28-Matt6:29)** parallel [LUK 12:27](https://ref.ly/Luke12:27) *See also* [JOB 38:25](https://ref.ly/Job38:25); [PSA 104:14–104:16](https://ref.ly/Ps104:14-Ps104:16); [JON 4:6–4:10](https://ref.ly/Jonah4:6-Jonah4:10)

### In the elements and seasons

**[PSA 135:7](https://ref.ly/Ps135:7)** *See also* [GEN 8:22](https://ref.ly/Gen8:22); [JOB 5:10](https://ref.ly/Job5:10), [JOB 36:27](https://ref.ly/Job36:27), [JOB 37:11–37:13](https://ref.ly/Job37:11-Job37:13); [JER 10:13](https://ref.ly/Jer10:13)

God makes himself known through the natural order
-------------------------------------------------

**[JOB 36:24–36:26](https://ref.ly/Job36:24-Job36:26)** *See also* [PSA 8:1–8:4](https://ref.ly/Ps8:1-Ps8:4), [PSA 19:1–19:3](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1-Ps19:3); [ACT 14:15–14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:15-Acts14:17), [ACT 17:24–17:28](https://ref.ly/Acts17:24-Acts17:28); [ROM 1:18–1:21](https://ref.ly/Rom1:18-Rom1:21)

## 4065: orderliness (id: 4065)

In his creating, sustaining and saving work, God reveals himself as a God of order. Likewise, the life of his people and of society as a whole should be orderly.

Orderliness in creation
-----------------------

**[ISA 45:12](https://ref.ly/Isa45:12)** *See also* [GEN 1:31](https://ref.ly/Gen1:31); [JOB 26:7–26:10](https://ref.ly/Job26:7-Job26:10), [JOB 38:4–38:11](https://ref.ly/Job38:4-Job38:11); [PSA 8:3](https://ref.ly/Ps8:3), [PSA 19:1](https://ref.ly/Ps19:1), [PSA 104:5–104:9](https://ref.ly/Ps104:5-Ps104:9); [ISA 40:26](https://ref.ly/Isa40:26); [ACT 17:26](https://ref.ly/Acts17:26)

Orderliness in providence
-------------------------

**[GEN 8:22](https://ref.ly/Gen8:22)** *See also* [PSA 65:9](https://ref.ly/Ps65:9), [PSA 104:14–104:27](https://ref.ly/Ps104:14-Ps104:27), [PSA 145:15](https://ref.ly/Ps145:15); [ACT 14:17](https://ref.ly/Acts14:17)

Orderliness in salvation
------------------------

### Salvation was planned by God

**[ROM 8:29](https://ref.ly/Rom8:29)** *See also* [1CO 2:7](https://ref.ly/1Cor2:7); [EPH 1:4–1:5](https://ref.ly/Eph1:4-Eph1:5); [2TI 1:9](https://ref.ly/2Tim1:9); [TIT 1:2](https://ref.ly/Titus1:2); [1PE 1:2](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:2); [REV 13:8](https://ref.ly/Rev13:8)

### Jesus Christ's coming was prepared in advance

**[LUK 24:26–24:27](https://ref.ly/Luke24:26-Luke24:27)** *See also* [JHN 5:46](https://ref.ly/John5:46); [ACT 2:23](https://ref.ly/Acts2:23), [ACT 3:18](https://ref.ly/Acts3:18); [GAL 4:4](https://ref.ly/Gal4:4)

Orderliness in the life of God's people
---------------------------------------

### Corporate worship must be orderly

**[EXO 25:9](https://ref.ly/Exod25:9)**; **[1CO 14:40](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:40)** *See also* [1CH 28:12](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:12); [ACT 7:44](https://ref.ly/Acts7:44); [1CO 14:32–14:33](https://ref.ly/1Cor14:32-1Cor14:33)

### Personal devotion includes orderliness

**[1TH 5:6](https://ref.ly/1Thess5:6)** *See also* [PRO 25:28](https://ref.ly/Prov25:28); [ROM 13:13](https://ref.ly/Rom13:13); [1CO 7:17](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:17); [EPH 5:16](https://ref.ly/Eph5:16); [1TI 3:2–3:5](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:2-1Tim3:5)

### Respect for leaders as part of God's order

**[EXO 22:28](https://ref.ly/Exod22:28)**; **[HEB 13:17](https://ref.ly/Heb13:17)** *See also* [1SA 24:6](https://ref.ly/1Sam24:6); [1TI 5:17](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:17); [HEB 13:7](https://ref.ly/Heb13:7)

### Order in pastoral care

**[1CO 12:28](https://ref.ly/1Cor12:28)**; **[TIT 1:5](https://ref.ly/Titus1:5)** *See also* [ACT 6:3](https://ref.ly/Acts6:3), [ACT 14:23](https://ref.ly/Acts14:23); [ROM 12:4–12:8](https://ref.ly/Rom12:4-Rom12:8); [EPH 4:11](https://ref.ly/Eph4:11); [1PE 4:10](https://ref.ly/1Pet4:10), [1PE 5:1–5:3](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:1-1Pet5:3)

Orderliness in society
----------------------

### God gives responsibility in his administration to men and women

[PSA 82:6](https://ref.ly/Ps82:6); ; [DAN 6:2–6:7](https://ref.ly/Dan6:2-Dan6:7); ; [ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1); ; [TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1); ; [1PE 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13-1Pet2:14)

### Governing authorities are ordained by God

**[ROM 13:1](https://ref.ly/Rom13:1)** *See also* [JHN 19:11](https://ref.ly/John19:11); [ROM 13:6](https://ref.ly/Rom13:6)

### Those in authority are to be honoured

**[TIT 3:1](https://ref.ly/Titus3:1)** *See also* [MAT 22:21](https://ref.ly/Matt22:21) parallels [MRK 12:17](https://ref.ly/Mark12:17), [LUK 20:25](https://ref.ly/Luke20:25); [1TI 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:1-1Tim2:2); [1PE 2:13](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:13)

### Order in the home and workplace

**[1TI 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:4)** *See also* [EXO 6:14](https://ref.ly/Exod6:14), [EXO 20:12](https://ref.ly/Exod20:12); [1SA 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Sam3:13); [JOB 1:5](https://ref.ly/Job1:5); [EPH 6:1](https://ref.ly/Eph6:1), [EPH 6:5](https://ref.ly/Eph6:5); [1TI 3:4](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:4), [1TI 3:12](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:12), [1TI 6:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim6:1); [TIT 1:6](https://ref.ly/Titus1:6), [TIT 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Titus2:4-Titus2:5), [TIT 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/Titus2:9-Titus2:10); [1PE 2:18](https://ref.ly/1Pet2:18)
