## 4110: angels (id: 4110)

Spiritual beings who assist God, especially in his work of salvation, conveying his word to human beings and attending to the needs of God's people.

* **Associated Articles:** 4111: angels, as God's servants (ID: `4111@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4112: angels, as God's messengers (ID: `4112@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4113: angels, as agents of God's judgment (ID: `4113@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4114: angels, and praise of God (ID: `4114@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4115: angel, of the Lord (ID: `4115@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4116: angels, opposed to God (ID: `4116@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4111: angels, as God's servants (id: 4111)

Angels have specific yet limited roles to play in declaring God's will and purposes for humanity.

Angels are God's servants
-------------------------

**[PSA 103:20](https://ref.ly/Ps103:20)** *See also* [HEB 1:7](https://ref.ly/Heb1:7); [PSA 104:4](https://ref.ly/Ps104:4)

### Named angels

The archangel Michael: [DAN 10:13](https://ref.ly/Dan10:13), [DAN 12:1](https://ref.ly/Dan12:1); ; [JUD 1:9](https://ref.ly/Jude1:9); ; [REV 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7); [DAN 8:16](https://ref.ly/Dan8:16), [DAN 9:21](https://ref.ly/Dan9:21); ; [LUK 1:19](https://ref.ly/Luke1:19), [LUK 1:26](https://ref.ly/Luke1:26)

Angels as agents of God's salvation
-----------------------------------

**[HEB 1:14](https://ref.ly/Heb1:14)** *See also* [EXO 23:23](https://ref.ly/Exod23:23), [EXO 32:34](https://ref.ly/Exod32:34), [EXO 33:2](https://ref.ly/Exod33:2); [NUM 20:16](https://ref.ly/Num20:16); [ISA 63:8–63:9](https://ref.ly/Isa63:8-Isa63:9)

### Angels do not fully understand God's salvation

[1PE 1:10–1:12](https://ref.ly/1Pet1:10-1Pet1:12)

### Angels deliver God's people from their enemies

[2KI 19:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:35) parallels [2CH 32:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:21), [ISA 37:36](https://ref.ly/Isa37:36); ; [ACT 5:19](https://ref.ly/Acts5:19), [ACT 12:6–12:11](https://ref.ly/Acts12:6-Acts12:11)

Angels as mediators
-------------------

**[ACT 7:53](https://ref.ly/Acts7:53)** *The law was mediated by angels to Moses and Israel* *See also* [JOB 33:22–33:26](https://ref.ly/Job33:22-Job33:26); [ACT 7:38](https://ref.ly/Acts7:38); [GAL 3:19](https://ref.ly/Gal3:19); [HEB 2:2](https://ref.ly/Heb2:2)

Angels as revealers of God's will
---------------------------------

**[ZEC 1:8–1:10](https://ref.ly/Zech1:8-Zech1:10)** *See also* [DAN 7:15–7:16](https://ref.ly/Dan7:15-Dan7:16); [ZEC 4:11–4:14](https://ref.ly/Zech4:11-Zech4:14); [REV 17:1](https://ref.ly/Rev17:1), [REV 21:9](https://ref.ly/Rev21:9)

### Angels convey and fulfil God's instructions

**[ZEC 3:4](https://ref.ly/Zech3:4)** *See also* [NUM 22:21–22:35](https://ref.ly/Num22:21-Num22:35); [ZEC 3:6–3:7](https://ref.ly/Zech3:6-Zech3:7); [MAT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Matt2:13); [GAL 1:8](https://ref.ly/Gal1:8); [REV 7:2](https://ref.ly/Rev7:2)

Angels attend to the needs of God's people
------------------------------------------

### Angels provide food at special times

**[1KI 19:5–19:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:5-1Kgs19:7)** *See also* [PSA 78:23–78:25](https://ref.ly/Ps78:23-Ps78:25)

### Angels provide protection

**[PSA 91:11–91:12](https://ref.ly/Ps91:11-Ps91:12)** *See also* [GEN 19:15](https://ref.ly/Gen19:15), [GEN 48:16](https://ref.ly/Gen48:16); [PSA 34:7](https://ref.ly/Ps34:7); [DAN 3:28](https://ref.ly/Dan3:28), [DAN 6:22](https://ref.ly/Dan6:22); [MAT 18:10](https://ref.ly/Matt18:10); [ACT 27:23–27:24](https://ref.ly/Acts27:23-Acts27:24)

Angels give guidance
--------------------

**[EXO 23:20](https://ref.ly/Exod23:20)** *See also* [GEN 24:7](https://ref.ly/Gen24:7), [GEN 24:40](https://ref.ly/Gen24:40); [ACT 8:26](https://ref.ly/Acts8:26)

Angels serve Jesus Christ
-------------------------

### Angels care for Jesus Christ's needs

**[MAT 4:11](https://ref.ly/Matt4:11)** parallel [MRK 1:13](https://ref.ly/Mark1:13) *See also* [LUK 22:43](https://ref.ly/Luke22:43)

### Angels are ready to protect Jesus Christ

**[MAT 26:53](https://ref.ly/Matt26:53)** *See also* [MAT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Matt2:13), [MAT 2:19–2:20](https://ref.ly/Matt2:19-Matt2:20), [MAT 4:6](https://ref.ly/Matt4:6) parallel [LUK 4:10](https://ref.ly/Luke4:10); [PSA 91:11–91:12](https://ref.ly/Ps91:11-Ps91:12)

### Angels are inferior to Jesus Christ

**[HEB 1:5–1:13](https://ref.ly/Heb1:5-Heb1:13)**

## 4112: angels, as God's messengers (id: 4112)

Spiritual messengers with the special role of making known God's work of salvation.

Angels give hope through the words of the prophets
--------------------------------------------------

**[ISA 40:3–40:5](https://ref.ly/Isa40:3-Isa40:5)** *The voice in this passage may be that of an angel.* [ISA 40:1–40:2](https://ref.ly/Isa40:1-Isa40:2), [ISA 40:6–40:8](https://ref.ly/Isa40:6-Isa40:8); [DAN 8:15–8:16](https://ref.ly/Dan8:15-Dan8:16), [DAN 10:12](https://ref.ly/Dan10:12), [DAN 10:14–10:21](https://ref.ly/Dan10:14-Dan10:21), [DAN 12:8–12:13](https://ref.ly/Dan12:8-Dan12:13); [ZEC 1:12–1:21](https://ref.ly/Zech1:12-Zech1:21), [ZEC 2:3–2:5](https://ref.ly/Zech2:3-Zech2:5), [ZEC 4:1–4:7](https://ref.ly/Zech4:1-Zech4:7)

Angels and the coming of the Messiah
------------------------------------

### An angel foretells the birth of John the Baptist

**[LUK 1:11–1:13](https://ref.ly/Luke1:11-Luke1:13)** *See also* [LUK 1:14–1:19](https://ref.ly/Luke1:14-Luke1:19)

### Angels foretell Jesus Christ's birth

**[MAT 1:20–1:21](https://ref.ly/Matt1:20-Matt1:21)** *See also* [LUK 1:26–1:38](https://ref.ly/Luke1:26-Luke1:38)

### Angels announce Jesus Christ's birth

**[LUK 2:8–2:11](https://ref.ly/Luke2:8-Luke2:11)** *See also* [LUK 2:12–2:20](https://ref.ly/Luke2:12-Luke2:20)

Angels announce Jesus Christ's resurrection
-------------------------------------------

**[MAT 28:5–28:7](https://ref.ly/Matt28:5-Matt28:7)** parallel [MRK 16:5–16:7](https://ref.ly/Mark16:5-Mark16:7) *See also* [LUK 24:4–24:7](https://ref.ly/Luke24:4-Luke24:7), [LUK 24:23](https://ref.ly/Luke24:23); [JHN 20:10–20:14](https://ref.ly/John20:10-John20:14)

Angels foretell Jesus Christ's second coming
--------------------------------------------

**[ACT 1:10–1:11](https://ref.ly/Acts1:10-Acts1:11)**

Angels reveal the gospel for the Gentiles
-----------------------------------------

**[ACT 11:13](https://ref.ly/Acts11:13)** *See also* [ACT 10:1–10:5](https://ref.ly/Acts10:1-Acts10:5), [ACT 10:30–10:33](https://ref.ly/Acts10:30-Acts10:33); [REV 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:6-Rev14:7)

Angels foretell God's final triumph
-----------------------------------

**[REV 1:1](https://ref.ly/Rev1:1)** *See also* [REV 19:9](https://ref.ly/Rev19:9), [REV 22:1](https://ref.ly/Rev22:1), [REV 22:6](https://ref.ly/Rev22:6), [REV 22:16](https://ref.ly/Rev22:16)

* **Associated Articles:** 1454: theophany (ID: `1454@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2505: Jesus Christ, ascension of (ID: `2505@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2515: Jesus Christ, birth of (ID: `2515@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2555: Jesus Christ, resurrection appearances of (ID: `2555@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2565: Jesus Christ, second coming of (ID: `2565@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5098: John the Baptist (ID: `5098@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5408: messenger (ID: `5408@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7772: prophets (ID: `7772@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9105: last things (ID: `9105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9610: hope (ID: `9610@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4113: angels, as agents of God's judgment (id: 4113)

Spiritual beings who assist God in carrying out his judgments. Angels will be especially active when Jesus Christ returns for the last judgment.

Angels as agents of earthly judgments
-------------------------------------

**[PSA 78:49](https://ref.ly/Ps78:49)**

### Against Sodom and Gomorrah

*See also* [GEN 19:13](https://ref.ly/Gen19:13), [GEN 19:24–19:25](https://ref.ly/Gen19:24-Gen19:25)

### Against opponents of God

[EXO 12:23](https://ref.ly/Exod12:23); ; [2KI 19:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:35) parallels [2CH 32:21](https://ref.ly/2Chr32:21), [ISA 37:36](https://ref.ly/Isa37:36); ; [PSA 35:4–35:6](https://ref.ly/Ps35:4-Ps35:6)

### Against Israel

[EXO 32:35](https://ref.ly/Exod32:35); ; [2SA 24:16–24:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:16-2Sam24:17) parallel [1CH 21:15–21:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:15-1Chr21:16); ; [1CO 10:10](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:10)

### Against Herod Antipas

[ACT 12:18–12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:18-Acts12:23)

Angels restrained by God's mercy
--------------------------------

**[1CH 21:15–21:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:15-1Chr21:16)** parallel [2SA 24:16–24:17](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:16-2Sam24:17) *See also* [GEN 18:20–18:32](https://ref.ly/Gen18:20-Gen18:32)

Angels and final judgment
-------------------------

### Angels proclaim God's sovereignty

**[REV 12:10–12:12](https://ref.ly/Rev12:10-Rev12:12)** *See also* [REV 10:1–10:4](https://ref.ly/Rev10:1-Rev10:4), [REV 11:15](https://ref.ly/Rev11:15)

### Angels announce God's final invitation

**[REV 14:6–14:7](https://ref.ly/Rev14:6-Rev14:7)** *See also* [REV 14:9–14:13](https://ref.ly/Rev14:9-Rev14:13), [REV 19:9](https://ref.ly/Rev19:9)

### Angels hold back the final judgment

[REV 7:1–7:3](https://ref.ly/Rev7:1-Rev7:3)

### Angels carry out preliminary warning judgments

[REV 8:1–8:13](https://ref.ly/Rev8:1-Rev8:13), [REV 9:1–9:16](https://ref.ly/Rev9:1-Rev9:16), [REV 10:5–10:7](https://ref.ly/Rev10:5-Rev10:7)

### Angels accompany Jesus Christ when he returns to judge

**[2TH 1:7](https://ref.ly/2Thess1:7)** *See also* [MAT 16:27](https://ref.ly/Matt16:27), [MAT 25:31](https://ref.ly/Matt25:31); [MRK 8:38](https://ref.ly/Mark8:38) parallel [LUK 9:26](https://ref.ly/Luke9:26); [1TH 3:13](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:13)

### Angels gather everyone for the final judgment

**[MAT 13:37–13:41](https://ref.ly/Matt13:37-Matt13:41)** *See also* [MAT 13:49–13:50](https://ref.ly/Matt13:49-Matt13:50), [MAT 24:31](https://ref.ly/Matt24:31); [REV 14:15–14:19](https://ref.ly/Rev14:15-Rev14:19)

### Angels announce the final judgment

**[REV 14:15](https://ref.ly/Rev14:15)** *See also* [REV 10:8–10:11](https://ref.ly/Rev10:8-Rev10:11), [REV 17:1–17:3](https://ref.ly/Rev17:1-Rev17:3), [REV 17:7](https://ref.ly/Rev17:7), [REV 17:15](https://ref.ly/Rev17:15), [REV 18:1–18:2](https://ref.ly/Rev18:1-Rev18:2), [REV 18:4](https://ref.ly/Rev18:4)

### Angels enact the final judgment

**[REV 15:1](https://ref.ly/Rev15:1)** *See also* [REV 14:16–14:19](https://ref.ly/Rev14:16-Rev14:19), [REV 15:6–15:8](https://ref.ly/Rev15:6-Rev15:8), [REV 16:1–16:21](https://ref.ly/Rev16:1-Rev16:21), [REV 18:21](https://ref.ly/Rev18:21), [REV 19:17–19:18](https://ref.ly/Rev19:17-Rev19:18), [REV 20:1–20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:1-Rev20:3)

Angels are subject to judgment
------------------------------

**[1CO 6:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:3)** *See also* [2PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:4); [JUD 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jude1:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Psalms 78:49; Genesis 19:13; Genesis 19:24-25; Exodus 12:23; 2 Kings 19:35; 2 Chronicles 32:21; Isaiah 37:36; Psalms 35:4-6; Exodus 32:35; 2 Samuel 24:16-17; 1 Chronicles 21:15-16; 1 Corinthians 10:10; Acts 12:18-23; Genesis 18:20-32; Revelation 12:10-12; Revelation 10:1-4; Revelation 11:15; Revelation 14:6-7; Revelation 14:9-13; Revelation 19:9; Revelation 7:1-3; Revelation 8:1-13; Revelation 9:1-16; Revelation 10:5-7; 2 Thessalonians 1:7; Matthew 16:27; Matthew 25:31; Mark 8:38; Luke 9:26; 1 Thessalonians 3:13; Matthew 13:37-41; Matthew 13:49-50; Matthew 24:31; Revelation 14:15-19; Revelation 14:15; Revelation 10:8-11; Revelation 17:1-3; Revelation 17:7; Revelation 17:15; Revelation 18:1-2; Revelation 18:4; Revelation 15:1; Revelation 14:16-19; Revelation 15:6-8; Revelation 16:1-21; Revelation 18:21; Revelation 19:17-18; Revelation 20:1-3; 1 Corinthians 6:3; 2 Peter 2:4; Jude 1:6

## 4114: angels, and praise of God (id: 4114)

Spiritual beings who praise God in a manner that is beyond human capacity.

Angels worship God in his presence
----------------------------------

**[REV 7:11](https://ref.ly/Rev7:11)** *See also* [REV 3:5](https://ref.ly/Rev3:5), [REV 8:2](https://ref.ly/Rev8:2)

Angels praise God for his works
-------------------------------

### Angels praise God's work of creation

**[JOB 38:4–38:7](https://ref.ly/Job38:4-Job38:7)** *See also* [PSA 148:1–148:5](https://ref.ly/Ps148:1-Ps148:5); [NEH 9:6](https://ref.ly/Neh9:6)

### Angels praise God's work of redemption

**[LUK 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/Luke2:13-Luke2:14)** *The angels are praising God for Jesus Christ's birth.* *See also* [ISA 44:23](https://ref.ly/Isa44:23), [ISA 49:13](https://ref.ly/Isa49:13); [LUK 15:10](https://ref.ly/Luke15:10); [HEB 1:6](https://ref.ly/Heb1:6); [DEU 32:43](https://ref.ly/Deut32:43)

### Angels praise God's kingdom

**[PSA 103:19–103:21](https://ref.ly/Ps103:19-Ps103:21)** *See also* [PSA 96:10–96:11](https://ref.ly/Ps96:10-Ps96:11) parallel [1CH 16:30–16:31](https://ref.ly/1Chr16:30-1Chr16:31); [PSA 145:10–145:11](https://ref.ly/Ps145:10-Ps145:11); [REV 11:15](https://ref.ly/Rev11:15)

Angelic beings praise God
-------------------------

**[ISA 6:2–6:4](https://ref.ly/Isa6:2-Isa6:4)** *See also* [REV 4:8](https://ref.ly/Rev4:8), [REV 5:8–5:10](https://ref.ly/Rev5:8-Rev5:10), [REV 7:11–7:12](https://ref.ly/Rev7:11-Rev7:12)

Thousands of angels worship God
-------------------------------

**[HEB 12:22](https://ref.ly/Heb12:22)** *See also* [DEU 33:2](https://ref.ly/Deut33:2); [PSA 68:17](https://ref.ly/Ps68:17); [DAN 7:10](https://ref.ly/Dan7:10); [REV 5:11–5:12](https://ref.ly/Rev5:11-Rev5:12)

Images of angelic beings decorate Israel's sanctuaries
------------------------------------------------------

**[1KI 6:23–6:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:23-1Kgs6:29)** parallels [2CH 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:7), [2CH 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:10-2Chr3:13) *See also* [EXO 26:1](https://ref.ly/Exod26:1); [EZK 41:18–41:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:18-Ezek41:20), [EZK 41:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:25) *The images of the cherubim represent the angels who worship God in heaven.*

Angels are not to be worshipped
-------------------------------

**[REV 22:8–22:9](https://ref.ly/Rev22:8-Rev22:9)** *See also* [MAT 4:9–4:10](https://ref.ly/Matt4:9-Matt4:10) parallel [LUK 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/Luke4:7-Luke4:8); [ROM 1:25](https://ref.ly/Rom1:25); [COL 2:18](https://ref.ly/Col2:18)

* **Associated Passages:** Revelation 7:11; Revelation 3:5; Revelation 8:2; Job 38:4-7; Psalms 148:1-5; Nehemiah 9:6; Luke 2:13-14; Isaiah 44:23; Isaiah 49:13; Luke 15:10; Hebrews 1:6; Deuteronomy 32:43; Psalms 103:19-21; Psalms 96:10-11; 1 Chronicles 16:30-31; Psalms 145:10-11; Revelation 11:15; Isaiah 6:2-4; Revelation 4:8; Revelation 5:8-10; Revelation 7:11-12; Hebrews 12:22; Deuteronomy 33:2; Psalms 68:17; Daniel 7:10; Revelation 5:11-12; 1 Kings 6:23-29; 2 Chronicles 3:7; 2 Chronicles 3:10-13; Exodus 26:1; Ezekiel 41:18-20; Ezekiel 41:25; Revelation 22:8-9; Matthew 4:9-10; Luke 4:7-8; Romans 1:25; Colossians 2:18
* **Associated Articles:** 1130: God, sovereignty of (ID: `1130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2378: kingdom of God, characteristics of (ID: `2378@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4005: creation (ID: `4005@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4150: cherubim (ID: `4150@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4170: host of heaven (ID: `4170@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4180: seraphim (ID: `4180@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6720: redemption (ID: `6720@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7396: Most Holy Place (ID: `7396@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7458: tabernacle, the (ID: `7458@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7470: temple, significance of (ID: `7470@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8622: worship (ID: `8622@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8664: praise (ID: `8664@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4115: angel, of the Lord (id: 4115)

See [4140: angel of the Lord](4140.md)



## 4116: angels, opposed to God (id: 4116)

Spiritual beings who fell with Satan. They are under God's judgment and are subject to the authority of believers.

Spiritual authorities led by Satan
----------------------------------

**[2CO 11:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:14)** *See also* [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11); [EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12); [REV 9:11](https://ref.ly/Rev9:11)

Angels opposed to God will be judged
------------------------------------

**[JUD 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jude1:6)** *See also* [JOB 4:18](https://ref.ly/Job4:18), [JOB 15:15](https://ref.ly/Job15:15); [MAT 25:41](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41); [2PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:4); [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)

Jesus Christ has defeated Satan and his angels
----------------------------------------------

**[COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)** *See also* [GEN 3:15](https://ref.ly/Gen3:15); [EPH 1:19–1:21](https://ref.ly/Eph1:19-Eph1:21)

Satan's angels are resisted by God's faithful angels
----------------------------------------------------

**[REV 12:7–12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7-Rev12:9)** *See also* [DAN 10:13](https://ref.ly/Dan10:13), [DAN 10:20](https://ref.ly/Dan10:20) *The princes of Persia and Greece appear to be spiritual powers who resist God's rule over these regions.*

Jesus Christ gives authority over Satan and his angels to believers
-------------------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 10:18–10:19](https://ref.ly/Luke10:18-Luke10:19)** *See also* [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39), [ROM 16:20](https://ref.ly/Rom16:20); [1CO 6:3](https://ref.ly/1Cor6:3); [EPH 6:10–6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:10-Eph6:13); [JAS 4:7](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7)

* **Associated Passages:** 2 Corinthians 11:14; John 12:31; John 16:11; Ephesians 6:12; Revelation 9:11; Jude 1:6; Job 4:18; Job 15:15; Matthew 25:41; 2 Peter 2:4; Revelation 20:10; Colossians 2:15; Genesis 3:15; Ephesians 1:19-21; Revelation 12:7-9; Daniel 10:13; Daniel 10:20; Luke 10:18-19; Romans 8:38-39; Romans 16:20; 1 Corinthians 6:3; Ephesians 6:10-13; James 4:7
* **Associated Articles:** 2372: Jesus Christ, victory of (ID: `2372@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2525: Jesus Christ, cross of (ID: `2525@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4124: Satan, kingdom of (ID: `4124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4126: Satan, resistance to (ID: `4126@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4127: Satan, defeat of (ID: `4127@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4131: demons, kinds of (ID: `4131@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4135: demons, Jesus Christ's authority over (ID: `4135@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6157: fall, of Satan and his angels (ID: `6157@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8484: spiritual warfare, enemies in (ID: `8484@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4120: Satan (id: 4120)

The one who opposes the person and purposes of God. Satan is especially associated with deceit, temptation and testing, through which he attempts to deflect believers from obeying God.

* **Associated Articles:** 4121: Satan, as the enemy of God (ID: `4121@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4122: Satan, as tempter (ID: `4122@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4123: Satan, as deceiver (ID: `4123@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4124: Satan, kingdom of (ID: `4124@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4125: Satan, agents of (ID: `4125@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4126: Satan, resistance to (ID: `4126@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4127: Satan, defeat of (ID: `4127@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4121: Satan, as the enemy of God (id: 4121)

Scripture provides numerous examples of ways in which Satan opposes the presence and purposes of God in his world.

Satan and God's people
----------------------

### Satan opposes believers

**[1CH 21:1](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:1)** *See also* [JOB 2:1–2:7](https://ref.ly/Job2:1-Job2:7); [ZEC 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1-Zech3:2); [1TH 2:18](https://ref.ly/1Thess2:18)

### Satan accuses believers

**[REV 12:10](https://ref.ly/Rev12:10)** *See also* [JOB 1:8–1:11](https://ref.ly/Job1:8-Job1:11); [ZEC 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1-Zech3:2)

### Satan slanders believers

**[1TI 5:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:14)**

### Satan tests believers and causes their suffering

**[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [EPH 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11-Eph6:13), [EPH 6:16](https://ref.ly/Eph6:16)

### Satan opposes the work of the archangel Michael

**[JUD 1:9](https://ref.ly/Jude1:9)** [DAN 10:13](https://ref.ly/Dan10:13), [DAN 10:21](https://ref.ly/Dan10:21), [DAN 12:1](https://ref.ly/Dan12:1); ; [REV 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7)

Satan opposes God
-----------------

### Satan opposes God's purposes

**[MAT 16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:23)** parallel [MRK 8:33](https://ref.ly/Mark8:33)

### Satan opposes God's word

*See also* [MAT 13:3–13:19](https://ref.ly/Matt13:3-Matt13:19) parallels [MRK 4:3–4:16](https://ref.ly/Mark4:3-Mark4:16), [LUK 8:4–8:12](https://ref.ly/Luke8:4-Luke8:12) *the parable of the sower*; [MAT 13:24–13:39](https://ref.ly/Matt13:24-Matt13:39) *the parable of the weeds and its explanation*; [ACT 13:8–13:10](https://ref.ly/Acts13:8-Acts13:10) *Elymas, the sorcerer, acts on Satan's behalf to oppose Barnabas and Paul.*

### Satan opposes God's righteousness

[1JN 3:7–3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:7-1John3:10)

### Satan blasphemes God

[REV 13:6](https://ref.ly/Rev13:6)

Satan's opposition to God's work will not succeed
-------------------------------------------------

[ZEC 3:2](https://ref.ly/Zech3:2) *God rebukes him*; ; [LUK 10:19](https://ref.ly/Luke10:19) *His reign is temporary.*

Satan's role as adversary earns him varied titles
-------------------------------------------------

### The devil

He is the adversary because he deceives: [REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9), [REV 20:2–20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:2-Rev20:3)

### Belial

He is the adversary because he is the troublemaker or scoundrel (the same Hebrew word is used in the OT passages as in [2Co 6:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:15) to describe Satan's work): [DEU 13:13](https://ref.ly/Deut13:13); ; [1KI 21:10](https://ref.ly/1Kgs21:10); ; [PRO 6:12](https://ref.ly/Prov6:12); ; [2CO 6:15](https://ref.ly/2Cor6:15)

### The dragon

He is the adversary because he is the enemy: [REV 12:4](https://ref.ly/Rev12:4), [REV 12:13–12:14](https://ref.ly/Rev12:13-Rev12:14)

### The serpent

He is the adversary because he thwarts spiritual insight: [GEN 3:1–3:5](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:5), [GEN 3:13](https://ref.ly/Gen3:13); ; [2CO 11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3)

### The prince of this world

He is the adversary because his rule is temporary, not absolute: [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31), [JHN 14:30](https://ref.ly/John14:30), [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11)

### The angel of the Abyss

[REV 9:11](https://ref.ly/Rev9:11) *He is the adversary because he is the destroyer.*

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Chronicles 21:1; Job 2:1-7; Zechariah 3:1-2; 1 Thessalonians 2:18; Revelation 12:10; Job 1:8-11; 1 Timothy 5:14; Revelation 2:10; Ephesians 6:11-13; Ephesians 6:16; Jude 1:9; Daniel 10:13; Daniel 10:21; Daniel 12:1; Revelation 12:7; Matthew 16:23; Mark 8:33; Matthew 13:3-19; Mark 4:3-16; Luke 8:4-12; Matthew 13:24-39; Acts 13:8-10; 1 John 3:7-10; Revelation 13:6; Zechariah 3:2; Luke 10:19; Revelation 12:9; Revelation 20:2-3; 2 Corinthians 6:15; Deuteronomy 13:13; 1 Kings 21:10; Proverbs 6:12; Revelation 12:4; Revelation 12:13-14; Genesis 3:1-5; Genesis 3:13; 2 Corinthians 11:3; John 12:31; John 14:30; John 16:11; Revelation 9:11
* **Associated Articles:** 1115: God, purpose of (ID: `1115@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4145: archangels (ID: `4145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5214: attack (ID: `5214@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6157: fall, of Satan and his angels (ID: `6157@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8727: enemies (ID: `8727@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8739: evil, examples of (ID: `8739@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8785: opposition (ID: `8785@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8787: opposition, to God's person and work (ID: `8787@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8802: pride (ID: `8802@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4122: Satan, as tempter (id: 4122)

God's people are incited to evil by Satan. He seeks to exploit their weaknesses in order to deflect them from obedience to God.

Satan incites God's people to evil
----------------------------------

### Satan exploits human weaknesses

**[GEN 3:1–3:5](https://ref.ly/Gen3:1-Gen3:5)** *[Rev 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9) identifies the serpent with Satan.* *See also* [JOB 2:4–2:5](https://ref.ly/Job2:4-Job2:5); [EPH 4:26–4:27](https://ref.ly/Eph4:26-Eph4:27)

### He tempts Christians to fall away

**[1TH 3:5](https://ref.ly/1Thess3:5)** *See also* [LUK 22:31](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31); [1TI 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:7); [2TI 2:26](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:26)

### He inspires people to put God to the test

**[ACT 5:3–5:9](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3-Acts5:9)** *See also* [PSA 78:18](https://ref.ly/Ps78:18), [PSA 78:41](https://ref.ly/Ps78:41), [PSA 106:14](https://ref.ly/Ps106:14); [ACT 15:10](https://ref.ly/Acts15:10); [1CO 10:9](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:9)

### He makes sin attractive

Lack of integrity: [MAT 5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:37); ; [ACT 5:3](https://ref.ly/Acts5:3); [1CO 7:5](https://ref.ly/1Cor7:5); ; [1TI 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:14-1Tim5:15); [2CO 2:10–2:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:10-2Cor2:11) *unforgiveness*; ; [JAS 3:14–3:16](https://ref.ly/Jas3:14-Jas3:16) *envy and selfish ambition*

Jesus Christ is tempted by Satan
--------------------------------

### In the wilderness

[MAT 4:1–4:11](https://ref.ly/Matt4:1-Matt4:11) parallels [MRK 1:13](https://ref.ly/Mark1:13), [LUK 4:1–4:13](https://ref.ly/Luke4:1-Luke4:13)

### Through Simon Peter

[MAT 16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:23) parallel [MRK 8:33](https://ref.ly/Mark8:33)

### Jesus Christ identifies with believers

**[HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)** *See also* [HEB 2:8](https://ref.ly/Heb2:8)

Satan tests Christians
----------------------

**[REV 2:10](https://ref.ly/Rev2:10)** *See also* [LUK 22:31](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31); [REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)

Satan's temptations can be resisted
-----------------------------------

### By being alert

**[1PE 5:8](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8)**

### By prayer

**[MAT 26:41](https://ref.ly/Matt26:41)** parallels [MRK 14:38](https://ref.ly/Mark14:38), [LUK 22:40](https://ref.ly/Luke22:40) *See also* [MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13) parallel [LUK 11:4](https://ref.ly/Luke11:4); [LUK 22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:32), [LUK 22:46](https://ref.ly/Luke22:46)

### By relying on God's faithfulness

**[1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13)** *See also* [2PE 2:9](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:9); [REV 3:10](https://ref.ly/Rev3:10)

### By Jesus Christ's service as high priest

[HEB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Heb2:18), [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)

* **Associated Passages:** Genesis 3:1-5; Revelation 12:9; Job 2:4-5; Ephesians 4:26-27; 1 Thessalonians 3:5; Luke 22:31; 1 Timothy 3:7; 2 Timothy 2:26; Acts 5:3-9; Psalms 78:18; Psalms 78:41; Psalms 106:14; Acts 15:10; 1 Corinthians 10:9; Matthew 5:37; Acts 5:3; 1 Corinthians 7:5; 1 Timothy 5:14-15; 2 Corinthians 2:10-11; James 3:14-16; Matthew 4:1-11; Mark 1:13; Luke 4:1-13; Matthew 16:23; Mark 8:33; Hebrews 4:15; Hebrews 2:8; Revelation 2:10; Revelation 3:10; 1 Peter 5:8; Matthew 26:41; Mark 14:38; Luke 22:40; Matthew 6:13; Luke 11:4; Luke 22:32; Luke 22:46; 1 Corinthians 10:13; 2 Peter 2:9; Hebrews 2:18
* **Associated Articles:** 2306: Jesus Christ, as high priest (ID: `2306@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2575: Jesus Christ, temptation of (ID: `2575@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5201: accusation (ID: `5201@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5530: sifting (ID: `5530@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6248: temptation (ID: `6248@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4123: Satan, as deceiver (id: 4123)

Satan's character is deceitful, devious and cunning as in a variety of guises he seeks to influence people for his own ends.

Satan's deceitful character
---------------------------

### He is evil

**[MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13)** *See also* [MAT 5:37](https://ref.ly/Matt5:37), [MAT 13:19](https://ref.ly/Matt13:19); [JHN 17:15](https://ref.ly/John17:15); [2TH 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3); [1JN 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:13-1John2:14), [1JN 3:8](https://ref.ly/1John3:8), [1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12), [1JN 5:18](https://ref.ly/1John5:18)

### He is a liar

**[JHN 8:44](https://ref.ly/John8:44)** *See also* [GEN 3:4–3:5](https://ref.ly/Gen3:4-Gen3:5); [JOB 1:11](https://ref.ly/Job1:11), [JOB 2:5](https://ref.ly/Job2:5); [REV 3:9](https://ref.ly/Rev3:9)

### He is devious

**[2CO 11:14](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:14)** *See also* [2CO 11:3](https://ref.ly/2Cor11:3); [EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11); [2TH 2:9](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:9); [1TI 3:7](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:7); [2TI 2:26](https://ref.ly/2Tim2:26)

### He is scheming

**[EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11)** *See also* [2CO 2:10–2:11](https://ref.ly/2Cor2:10-2Cor2:11)

### He is a slanderer

**[JOB 1:9–1:11](https://ref.ly/Job1:9-Job1:11)** *See also* [1TI 5:14–5:15](https://ref.ly/1Tim5:14-1Tim5:15); [REV 2:9](https://ref.ly/Rev2:9)

Satan's deceitful work
----------------------

### He deceives individuals

**[1TI 2:14](https://ref.ly/1Tim2:14)** *Eve was deceived by Satan the serpent.* *See also* [DAN 8:25](https://ref.ly/Dan8:25); [2TI 3:13](https://ref.ly/2Tim3:13); [REV 12:9](https://ref.ly/Rev12:9), [REV 20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:3), [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)

### He works counterfeit miracles

**[2TH 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:9-2Thess2:10)** *See also* [EXO 7:11–7:12](https://ref.ly/Exod7:11-Exod7:12), [EXO 7:22](https://ref.ly/Exod7:22); [DEU 13:1–13:2](https://ref.ly/Deut13:1-Deut13:2); [MAT 24:24](https://ref.ly/Matt24:24) parallel [MRK 13:22](https://ref.ly/Mark13:22); [REV 13:13–13:14](https://ref.ly/Rev13:13-Rev13:14), [REV 19:20](https://ref.ly/Rev19:20)

### He appoints false prophets

**[MAT 7:15](https://ref.ly/Matt7:15)** *See also* [DEU 13:5](https://ref.ly/Deut13:5); [JER 23:26](https://ref.ly/Jer23:26), [JER 28:15](https://ref.ly/Jer28:15), [JER 29:21](https://ref.ly/Jer29:21); [EZK 13:6–13:10](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:6-Ezek13:10); [2PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:3), [2PE 2:18–2:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:18-2Pet2:19)

### He misuses Scripture

[MAT 4:6](https://ref.ly/Matt4:6) parallel [LUK 4:10](https://ref.ly/Luke4:10)

### He blinds unbelievers

**[2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)**

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 6:13; Matthew 5:37; Matthew 13:19; John 17:15; 2 Thessalonians 3:3; 1 John 2:13-14; 1 John 3:8; 1 John 3:12; 1 John 5:18; John 8:44; Genesis 3:4-5; Job 1:11; Job 2:5; Revelation 3:9; 2 Corinthians 11:14; 2 Corinthians 11:3; Ephesians 6:11; 2 Thessalonians 2:9; 1 Timothy 3:7; 2 Timothy 2:26; 2 Corinthians 2:10-11; Job 1:9-11; 1 Timothy 5:14-15; Revelation 2:9; 1 Timothy 2:14; Daniel 8:25; 2 Timothy 3:13; Revelation 12:9; Revelation 20:3; Revelation 20:10; 2 Thessalonians 2:9-10; Exodus 7:11-12; Exodus 7:22; Deuteronomy 13:1-2; Matthew 24:24; Mark 13:22; Revelation 13:13-14; Revelation 19:20; Matthew 7:15; Deuteronomy 13:5; Jeremiah 23:26; Jeremiah 28:15; Jeremiah 29:21; Ezekiel 13:6-10; 2 Peter 2:1-3; 2 Peter 2:18-19; Matthew 4:6; Luke 4:10; 2 Corinthians 4:4
* **Associated Articles:** 1415: miracles (ID: `1415@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6145: deceit (ID: `6145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7774: prophets, false (ID: `7774@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8735: evil, origins of (ID: `8735@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8776: lies (ID: `8776@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4124: Satan, kingdom of (id: 4124)

Satan is depicted as the prince of this world, having power over demons and over godless people. He is, however, subject to God's sovereignty and therefore his power is limited and his rule temporary.

Satan's power
-------------

### He has power in the world

**[1JN 5:19](https://ref.ly/1John5:19)** *See also* [JHN 7:7](https://ref.ly/John7:7), [JHN 8:44](https://ref.ly/John8:44), [JHN 14:17](https://ref.ly/John14:17), [JHN 15:18–15:19](https://ref.ly/John15:18-John15:19), [JHN 16:20](https://ref.ly/John16:20), [JHN 17:14](https://ref.ly/John17:14); [ACT 26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:18); [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4); [EPH 2:2](https://ref.ly/Eph2:2); [COL 1:13](https://ref.ly/Col1:13); [1JN 2:15–2:16](https://ref.ly/1John2:15-1John2:16), [1JN 4:4–4:5](https://ref.ly/1John4:4-1John4:5); [REV 13:12](https://ref.ly/Rev13:12)

### He claims power over this world

[MAT 4:8–4:9](https://ref.ly/Matt4:8-Matt4:9) parallel [LUK 4:6](https://ref.ly/Luke4:6)

### He is called the `prince'' or the`god'' of this world

**[JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31)** [JHN 14:30](https://ref.ly/John14:30), [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11); ; [2CO 4:4](https://ref.ly/2Cor4:4)

### He is responsible for some illnesses

**[LUK 13:16](https://ref.ly/Luke13:16)** *See also* [JOB 2:7](https://ref.ly/Job2:7); [ACT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Acts10:38); [2CO 12:7](https://ref.ly/2Cor12:7) *Paul's “thorn in the flesh” may or may not have been a physical illness.*

### He is responsible for death

**[HEB 2:14](https://ref.ly/Heb2:14)**

Satan's kingdom
---------------

### He has a kingdom

**[MAT 12:26](https://ref.ly/Matt12:26)** parallel [LUK 11:18](https://ref.ly/Luke11:18)**[COL 1:13](https://ref.ly/Col1:13)** *See also* [ACT 26:18](https://ref.ly/Acts26:18); [EPH 2:2](https://ref.ly/Eph2:2)

### He has a throne

**[REV 2:13](https://ref.ly/Rev2:13)**

### He is the prince of demons

**[MAT 9:34](https://ref.ly/Matt9:34)** *The name Beelzebub is used elsewhere to name the prince of the demons. This name was used also to identify Satan.* *See also* [MAT 12:24](https://ref.ly/Matt12:24) parallels [MRK 3:22](https://ref.ly/Mark3:22), [LUK 11:15](https://ref.ly/Luke11:15)

Satan's authority is limited
----------------------------

### He cannot do more than God allows

**[JOB 1:12](https://ref.ly/Job1:12)** *See also* [JOB 2:6](https://ref.ly/Job2:6); [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); [REV 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rev12:12), [REV 20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:3)

### His rule is temporary

[ROM 16:20](https://ref.ly/Rom16:20); ; [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 John 5:19; John 7:7; John 8:44; John 14:17; John 15:18-19; John 16:20; John 17:14; Acts 26:18; 2 Corinthians 4:4; Ephesians 2:2; Colossians 1:13; 1 John 2:15-16; 1 John 4:4-5; Revelation 13:12; Matthew 4:8-9; Luke 4:6; John 12:31; John 14:30; John 16:11; Luke 13:16; Job 2:7; Acts 10:38; 2 Corinthians 12:7; Hebrews 2:14; Matthew 12:26; Luke 11:18; Revelation 2:13; Matthew 9:34; Matthew 12:24; Mark 3:22; Luke 11:15; Job 1:12; Job 2:6; 1 Corinthians 10:13; Revelation 12:12; Revelation 20:3; Romans 16:20; Revelation 20:10
* **Associated Articles:** 1130: God, sovereignty of (ID: `1130@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2345: Jesus Christ, kingdom of (ID: `2345@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2375: kingdom of God (ID: `2375@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4025: world, the (ID: `4025@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5347: injustice (ID: `5347@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5459: prince (ID: `5459@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4125: Satan, agents of (id: 4125)

Satan works in this world through people and through those spiritual beings who acknowledge his authority. His agents oppose God's will and purposes.

Satan works through people
--------------------------

### Satan's human agents pursue his evil desires

**[JHN 8:44](https://ref.ly/John8:44)** *Jesus Christ speaking of the relationship of some unbelieving Jews to Satan.* *See also* [ACT 13:10](https://ref.ly/Acts13:10); [1JN 3:8–3:10](https://ref.ly/1John3:8-1John3:10), [1JN 3:12](https://ref.ly/1John3:12)

### Satan works through people to oppose God's purposes

[ACT 5:1–5:9](https://ref.ly/Acts5:1-Acts5:9) *Ananias and Sapphira*; ; [MAT 16:23](https://ref.ly/Matt16:23) parallel [MRK 8:33](https://ref.ly/Mark8:33) *Simon Peter*; [LUK 22:3](https://ref.ly/Luke22:3); ; [JHN 6:70](https://ref.ly/John6:70), [JHN 13:2](https://ref.ly/John13:2), [JHN 13:27](https://ref.ly/John13:27); [ACT 13:8–13:10](https://ref.ly/Acts13:8-Acts13:10) *Elymas, the sorcerer*

Examples of people doing Satan's work
-------------------------------------

### False prophets

[DEU 13:5](https://ref.ly/Deut13:5); ; [JER 23:26–23:27](https://ref.ly/Jer23:26-Jer23:27), [JER 28:15](https://ref.ly/Jer28:15), [JER 29:21](https://ref.ly/Jer29:21); ; [EZK 13:6–13:9](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:6-Ezek13:9); ; [MAT 7:15](https://ref.ly/Matt7:15), [MAT 24:24](https://ref.ly/Matt24:24); ; [2PE 2:1–2:3](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:1-2Pet2:3)

### Others who lead people away from God

[DEU 13:13](https://ref.ly/Deut13:13); ; [2KI 21:9–21:26](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:9-2Kgs21:26) *Manasseh and his son, Amon*; ; [PRO 7:21](https://ref.ly/Prov7:21) *the adulteress*; ; [ISA 3:12](https://ref.ly/Isa3:12); ; [JER 50:6](https://ref.ly/Jer50:6); ; [2PE 2:18–2:19](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:18-2Pet2:19)

Satan works through his spiritual agents
----------------------------------------

### Satan's angels

**[MAT 25:41](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41)** *See also* [2PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:4); [REV 12:7](https://ref.ly/Rev12:7) *“angel” and “messenger” are the same word in Greek*

### Satan's demons

**[LUK 13:11–13:16](https://ref.ly/Luke13:11-Luke13:16)** *See also* [MAT 12:22](https://ref.ly/Matt12:22); [LUK 11:14–11:15](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14-Luke11:15)

Satan's agents are identified by various images and titles
----------------------------------------------------------

### The little horn

[DAN 8:9–8:12](https://ref.ly/Dan8:9-Dan8:12) *This probably represents Antiochus Epiphanes.*

### The prince of Persia

[DAN 10:13](https://ref.ly/Dan10:13) *probably representing a demon with influence over the Persian kingdom*

### The king of the North

[DAN 11:28](https://ref.ly/Dan11:28) *probably representing Antiochus Epiphanes*

### The antichrist

[1JN 4:1–4:4](https://ref.ly/1John4:1-1John4:4); ; [2JN 1:7](https://ref.ly/2John1:7)

### The man of lawlessness

[2TH 2:3–2:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:3-2Thess2:10)

### The beast

[REV 11:7](https://ref.ly/Rev11:7), [REV 13:1–13:8](https://ref.ly/Rev13:1-Rev13:8), [REV 13:11–13:18](https://ref.ly/Rev13:11-Rev13:18), [REV 14:9–14:11](https://ref.ly/Rev14:9-Rev14:11), [REV 16:13](https://ref.ly/Rev16:13), [REV 17:8](https://ref.ly/Rev17:8), [REV 19:20](https://ref.ly/Rev19:20), [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)

### The false prophet

[REV 16:13](https://ref.ly/Rev16:13), [REV 19:20](https://ref.ly/Rev19:20)

### The prostitute or Babylon the Great

[REV 14:8](https://ref.ly/Rev14:8), [REV 16:19](https://ref.ly/Rev16:19), [REV 17:1–17:18](https://ref.ly/Rev17:1-Rev17:18), [REV 18:1–18:10](https://ref.ly/Rev18:1-Rev18:10), [REV 18:18](https://ref.ly/Rev18:18), [REV 19:2](https://ref.ly/Rev19:2)

* **Associated Passages:** John 8:44; Acts 13:10; 1 John 3:8-10; 1 John 3:12; Acts 5:1-9; Matthew 16:23; Mark 8:33; Luke 22:3; John 6:70; John 13:2; John 13:27; Acts 13:8-10; Deuteronomy 13:5; Jeremiah 23:26-27; Jeremiah 28:15; Jeremiah 29:21; Ezekiel 13:6-9; Matthew 7:15; Matthew 24:24; 2 Peter 2:1-3; Deuteronomy 13:13; 2 Kings 21:9-26; Proverbs 7:21; Isaiah 3:12; Jeremiah 50:6; 2 Peter 2:18-19; Matthew 25:41; 2 Peter 2:4; Revelation 12:7; Luke 13:11-16; Matthew 12:22; Luke 11:14-15; Daniel 8:9-12; Daniel 10:13; Daniel 11:28; 1 John 4:1-4; 2 John 1:7; 2 Thessalonians 2:3-10; Revelation 11:7; Revelation 13:1-8; Revelation 13:11-18; Revelation 14:9-11; Revelation 16:13; Revelation 17:8; Revelation 19:20; Revelation 20:10; Revelation 14:8; Revelation 16:19; Revelation 17:1-18; Revelation 18:1-10; Revelation 18:18; Revelation 19:2
* **Associated Articles:** 4116: angels, opposed to God (ID: `4116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4131: demons, kinds of (ID: `4131@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4195: spirits (ID: `4195@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4609: beast, the (ID: `4609@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 7774: prophets, false (ID: `7774@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9115: antichrist, the (ID: `9115@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4126: Satan, resistance to (id: 4126)

Jesus Christ resisted Satan in his ministry, and believers are commanded to follow his example in this respect. God assists believers in this struggle.

Satan can be resisted
---------------------

### His power is limited

[JOB 1:12](https://ref.ly/Job1:12), [JOB 2:6](https://ref.ly/Job2:6); ; [1CO 10:13](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:13); ; [REV 12:12](https://ref.ly/Rev12:12), [REV 20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:3)

### Jesus Christ resists Satan

[MAT 4:1–4:11](https://ref.ly/Matt4:1-Matt4:11) parallel [LUK 4:1–4:13](https://ref.ly/Luke4:1-Luke4:13); ; [JHN 1:5](https://ref.ly/John1:5); ; [HEB 2:18](https://ref.ly/Heb2:18), [HEB 4:15](https://ref.ly/Heb4:15)

### Christians can resist Satan

**[JAS 4:7](https://ref.ly/Jas4:7)** *See also* [LUK 10:19](https://ref.ly/Luke10:19); [ROM 6:13](https://ref.ly/Rom6:13); [EPH 4:26–4:27](https://ref.ly/Eph4:26-Eph4:27), [EPH 6:11–6:13](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11-Eph6:13); [1PE 5:8–5:9](https://ref.ly/1Pet5:8-1Pet5:9); [2PE 3:17](https://ref.ly/2Pet3:17); [1JN 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:13-1John2:14)

God protects his people from Satan
----------------------------------

**[2TH 3:3](https://ref.ly/2Thess3:3)** *See also* [1JN 5:18](https://ref.ly/1John5:18)

God's protection is to be sought in prayer
------------------------------------------

**[JHN 17:15](https://ref.ly/John17:15)** *See also* [MAT 6:13](https://ref.ly/Matt6:13); [LUK 22:31–22:32](https://ref.ly/Luke22:31-Luke22:32); [EPH 6:11](https://ref.ly/Eph6:11), [EPH 6:18](https://ref.ly/Eph6:18)

Jesus Christ has the victory over Satan
---------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ's defeat of Satan on the cross

**[COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)** *See also* [JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31); [REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)

### Jesus Christ's name is powerful against Satan

**[PHP 2:10](https://ref.ly/Phil2:10)** *See also* [ISA 45:23](https://ref.ly/Isa45:23); [PSA 118:10–118:12](https://ref.ly/Ps118:10-Ps118:12); [MRK 16:17–16:18](https://ref.ly/Mark16:17-Mark16:18); [LUK 10:17](https://ref.ly/Luke10:17); [ACT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:18)

### God's love cannot be thwarted

[ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39)

Resisting Satan brings reward
-----------------------------

**[2TI 4:7–4:8](https://ref.ly/2Tim4:7-2Tim4:8)** *See also* [JAS 1:12](https://ref.ly/Jas1:12); [REV 2:7](https://ref.ly/Rev2:7), [REV 2:17](https://ref.ly/Rev2:17), [REV 2:26](https://ref.ly/Rev2:26), [REV 3:5](https://ref.ly/Rev3:5), [REV 3:12](https://ref.ly/Rev3:12), [REV 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rev3:21)

* **Associated Passages:** Job 1:12; Job 2:6; 1 Corinthians 10:13; Revelation 12:12; Revelation 20:3; Matthew 4:1-11; Luke 4:1-13; John 1:5; Hebrews 2:18; Hebrews 4:15; James 4:7; Luke 10:19; Romans 6:13; Ephesians 4:26-27; Ephesians 6:11-13; 1 Peter 5:8-9; 2 Peter 3:17; 1 John 2:13-14; 2 Thessalonians 3:3; 1 John 5:18; John 17:15; Matthew 6:13; Luke 22:31-32; Ephesians 6:11; Ephesians 6:18; Colossians 2:15; John 12:31; Revelation 12:11; Philippians 2:10; Isaiah 45:23; Psalms 118:10-12; Mark 16:17-18; Luke 10:17; Acts 16:18; Romans 8:38-39; 2 Timothy 4:7-8; James 1:12; Revelation 2:7; Revelation 2:17; Revelation 2:26; Revelation 3:5; Revelation 3:12; Revelation 3:21
* **Associated Articles:** 1320: God, as Saviour (ID: `1320@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2372: Jesus Christ, victory of (ID: `2372@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5498: reward (ID: `5498@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5596: victory (ID: `5596@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6030: sin, avoidance of (ID: `6030@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6213: participation, in sin (ID: `6213@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6251: temptation, resisting (ID: `6251@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8482: spiritual warfare (ID: `8482@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8490: watchfulness (ID: `8490@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8602: prayer (ID: `8602@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8737: evil, believers' responses to (ID: `8737@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4127: Satan, defeat of (id: 4127)

Though defeated on Jesus Christ's cross, Satan is still active in this world, but his final overthrow by God is certain.

Satan is defeated by Jesus Christ
---------------------------------

### Jesus Christ is stronger than Satan

**[JHN 14:30](https://ref.ly/John14:30)** *See also* [MAT 12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:28); [LUK 13:16](https://ref.ly/Luke13:16); [ACT 10:38](https://ref.ly/Acts10:38); [GAL 1:4](https://ref.ly/Gal1:4)

### Jesus Christ came to destroy Satan's work

**[1JN 3:8](https://ref.ly/1John3:8)** *See also* [HEB 2:14–2:15](https://ref.ly/Heb2:14-Heb2:15)

### Satan is defeated on the cross

[COL 1:13](https://ref.ly/Col1:13); ; [TIT 2:14](https://ref.ly/Titus2:14); ; [REV 3:21](https://ref.ly/Rev3:21)

### Satan's defeat is foreseen by Jesus Christ

**[JHN 12:31](https://ref.ly/John12:31)** *See also* [MAT 25:41](https://ref.ly/Matt25:41); [LUK 10:18](https://ref.ly/Luke10:18); [JHN 16:11](https://ref.ly/John16:11)

### Satan's agents are also defeated

**[COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)** *See also* [ROM 8:38–8:39](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38-Rom8:39)

Satan is defeated by Christians
-------------------------------

**[REV 12:11](https://ref.ly/Rev12:11)** *See also* [ACT 5:40–5:42](https://ref.ly/Acts5:40-Acts5:42); [1JN 2:13–2:14](https://ref.ly/1John2:13-1John2:14)

Satan's final overthrow
-----------------------

### Satan and his agents will be destroyed

**[ROM 16:20](https://ref.ly/Rom16:20)** *See also* [REV 17:14](https://ref.ly/Rev17:14)

### Satan's final destiny

[1TI 3:6](https://ref.ly/1Tim3:6) *judgment*; [REV 20:1–20:3](https://ref.ly/Rev20:1-Rev20:3), [REV 20:10](https://ref.ly/Rev20:10)

### Death, the result of Satan's work, will be defeated

[1CO 15:26](https://ref.ly/1Cor15:26); ; [REV 20:13–20:14](https://ref.ly/Rev20:13-Rev20:14)

* **Associated Passages:** John 14:30; Matthew 12:28; Luke 13:16; Acts 10:38; Galatians 1:4; 1 John 3:8; Hebrews 2:14-15; Colossians 1:13; Titus 2:14; Revelation 3:21; John 12:31; Matthew 25:41; Luke 10:18; John 16:11; Colossians 2:15; Romans 8:38-39; Revelation 12:11; Acts 5:40-42; 1 John 2:13-14; Romans 16:20; Revelation 17:14; 1 Timothy 3:6; Revelation 20:1-3; Revelation 20:10; 1 Corinthians 15:26; Revelation 20:13-14
* **Associated Articles:** 2066: Jesus Christ, power of (ID: `2066@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2351: Jesus Christ, miracles of (ID: `2351@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2372: Jesus Christ, victory of (ID: `2372@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2410: cross, the (ID: `2410@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4135: demons, Jesus Christ's authority over (ID: `4135@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5290: defeat (ID: `5290@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5454: power, God's saving (ID: `5454@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8738: evil, victory over (ID: `8738@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9021: death, natural (ID: `9021@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9105: last things (ID: `9105@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9240: last judgment (ID: `9240@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 9511: hell, as a place of punishment (ID: `9511@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4130: demons (id: 4130)

Evil spiritual forces; Scripture stresses the reality of demonic forces and recognises a number of categories to which they may be assigned. Jesus Christ's authority over such demonic forces is seen at work in his ministry and in that of his disciples.

* **Associated Articles:** 4131: demons, kinds of (ID: `4131@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4132: demons, malevolence of (ID: `4132@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4133: demons, possession by (ID: `4133@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4134: demons, exorcism of (ID: `4134@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4135: demons, Jesus Christ's authority over (ID: `4135@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4131: demons, kinds of (id: 4131)

Scripture uses a number of terms to refer to demonic forces, stressing both their reality and hostility to God.

Demons
------

**[DEU 32:17](https://ref.ly/Deut32:17)**; **[1CO 10:20–10:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:20-1Cor10:21)** *See also* [PSA 106:37](https://ref.ly/Ps106:37); [MAT 8:16](https://ref.ly/Matt8:16); [MRK 7:26](https://ref.ly/Mark7:26); [ROM 8:38](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38); [JAS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Jas2:19); [REV 9:20](https://ref.ly/Rev9:20)

Evil spirits
------------

**[MAT 10:1](https://ref.ly/Matt10:1)**; **[ACT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Acts5:16), [ACT 8:7](https://ref.ly/Acts8:7)** *See also* [MAT 12:43–12:45](https://ref.ly/Matt12:43-Matt12:45); [MRK 1:23–1:26](https://ref.ly/Mark1:23-Mark1:26), [MRK 3:11](https://ref.ly/Mark3:11); [REV 18:2](https://ref.ly/Rev18:2)

Other terms for demons
----------------------

### Spirits

**[ACT 16:16](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16)** *See also* [MRK 9:17](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17)

### Spirits of demons

**[REV 16:14](https://ref.ly/Rev16:14)**

### Deceiving spirits

**[1TI 4:1](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1)**

### Authorities, powers and forces

**[EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12)**; **[COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)**; **[1PE 3:22](https://ref.ly/1Pet3:22)**

* **Associated Passages:** Deuteronomy 32:17; 1 Corinthians 10:20-21; Psalms 106:37; Matthew 8:16; Mark 7:26; Romans 8:38; James 2:19; Revelation 9:20; Matthew 10:1; Acts 5:16; Acts 8:7; Matthew 12:43-45; Mark 1:23-26; Mark 3:11; Revelation 18:2; Acts 16:16; Mark 9:17; Revelation 16:14; 1 Timothy 4:1; Ephesians 6:12; Colossians 2:15; 1 Peter 3:22
* **Associated Articles:** 4116: angels, opposed to God (ID: `4116@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4125: Satan, agents of (ID: `4125@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4195: spirits (ID: `4195@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4132: demons, malevolence of (id: 4132)

Demons are opposed to the person and work of God and seek to lead human beings, including believers, away from him. For this reason, believers are forbidden to be involved with them.

Demons harm individuals
-----------------------

### Demons cause torment and pain

Saul's torment: [1SA 16:14–16:16](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:14-1Sam16:16), [1SA 16:23](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:23), [1SA 18:10–18:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:10-1Sam18:11), [1SA 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:9-1Sam19:10); [MAT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22), [MAT 17:15](https://ref.ly/Matt17:15) parallels [MRK 9:18–9:20](https://ref.ly/Mark9:18-Mark9:20), [LUK 9:39–9:42](https://ref.ly/Luke9:39-Luke9:42) *the boy with an evil spirit*; ; [MRK 5:5](https://ref.ly/Mark5:5); ; [LUK 6:18](https://ref.ly/Luke6:18), [LUK 13:11](https://ref.ly/Luke13:11); ; [ACT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Acts5:16), [ACT 19:16](https://ref.ly/Acts19:16) *the seven sons of Sceva*

### Demons cause dissension

[JDG 9:23–9:25](https://ref.ly/Judg9:23-Judg9:25)

### Demons cause illness and handicaps

**[MRK 9:17–9:27](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17-Mark9:27)** parallels [MAT 17:14–17:18](https://ref.ly/Matt17:14-Matt17:18), [LUK 9:37–9:42](https://ref.ly/Luke9:37-Luke9:42) *See also* [MAT 9:32–9:33](https://ref.ly/Matt9:32-Matt9:33); [LUK 11:14](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14), [LUK 13:11](https://ref.ly/Luke13:11)

Demons are deceitful
--------------------

### Demons inspire false prophets

[1KI 22:21–22:23](https://ref.ly/1Kgs22:21-1Kgs22:23) parallel [2CH 18:21–18:22](https://ref.ly/2Chr18:21-2Chr18:22)

### Demons incite war

[REV 16:13–16:14](https://ref.ly/Rev16:13-Rev16:14)

### Demons lead people away from God

**[1JN 4:1–4:6](https://ref.ly/1John4:1-1John4:6)** *See also* [1TI 4:1–4:2](https://ref.ly/1Tim4:1-1Tim4:2); [REV 16:13–16:14](https://ref.ly/Rev16:13-Rev16:14)

The inspiration of pagan religions by demons
--------------------------------------------

### Pagan gods are identified as demons

**[1CO 10:20–10:21](https://ref.ly/1Cor10:20-1Cor10:21)** *See also* [DEU 32:16–32:17](https://ref.ly/Deut32:16-Deut32:17); [PSA 106:36–106:39](https://ref.ly/Ps106:36-Ps106:39); [REV 9:20](https://ref.ly/Rev9:20)

### Demons inhabit ruins of pagan cities

[REV 18:2](https://ref.ly/Rev18:2)

All involvement with spirits and mediums is forbidden
-----------------------------------------------------

**[LEV 19:31](https://ref.ly/Lev19:31)** *See also* [EXO 22:18](https://ref.ly/Exod22:18); [LEV 20:6](https://ref.ly/Lev20:6), [LEV 20:27](https://ref.ly/Lev20:27); [DEU 18:10–18:14](https://ref.ly/Deut18:10-Deut18:14); [JER 27:9](https://ref.ly/Jer27:9)

### Witchcraft is identified as a work of the sinful nature

[GAL 5:19–5:20](https://ref.ly/Gal5:19-Gal5:20)

### Involvement with sorcery or witchcraft is futile

**[ISA 47:9](https://ref.ly/Isa47:9)** *See also* [1SA 28:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:7), [1SA 28:14–28:20](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:14-1Sam28:20); [ISA 8:19–8:22](https://ref.ly/Isa8:19-Isa8:22), [ISA 19:3–19:4](https://ref.ly/Isa19:3-Isa19:4), [ISA 47:12–47:15](https://ref.ly/Isa47:12-Isa47:15); [NAM 3:3–3:4](https://ref.ly/Nah3:3-Nah3:4)

Examples of renunciation of the work of demons
----------------------------------------------

**[ACT 19:19](https://ref.ly/Acts19:19)** *See also* [1SA 28:9](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:9); [2KI 23:24](https://ref.ly/2Kgs23:24)

* **Associated Passages:** 1 Samuel 16:14-16; 1 Samuel 16:23; 1 Samuel 18:10-11; 1 Samuel 19:9-10; Matthew 15:22; Matthew 17:15; Mark 9:18-20; Luke 9:39-42; Mark 5:5; Luke 6:18; Luke 13:11; Acts 5:16; Acts 19:16; Judges 9:23-25; Mark 9:17-27; Matthew 17:14-18; Luke 9:37-42; Matthew 9:32-33; Luke 11:14; 1 Kings 22:21-23; 2 Chronicles 18:21-22; Revelation 16:13-14; 1 John 4:1-6; 1 Timothy 4:1-2; 1 Corinthians 10:20-21; Deuteronomy 32:16-17; Psalms 106:36-39; Revelation 9:20; Revelation 18:2; Leviticus 19:31; Exodus 22:18; Leviticus 20:6; Leviticus 20:27; Deuteronomy 18:10-14; Jeremiah 27:9; Galatians 5:19-20; Isaiah 47:9; 1 Samuel 28:7; 1 Samuel 28:14-20; Isaiah 8:19-22; Isaiah 19:3-4; Isaiah 47:12-15; Nahum 3:3-4; Acts 19:19; 1 Samuel 28:9; 2 Kings 23:24
* **Associated Articles:** 4155: divination (ID: `4155@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4175: mediums (ID: `4175@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4185: sorcery and magic (ID: `4185@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 5560: suffering (ID: `5560@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 6145: deceit (ID: `6145@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8734: evil (ID: `8734@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8768: idolatry (ID: `8768@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 8776: lies (ID: `8776@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4133: demons, possession by (id: 4133)

A recognised condition in Jesus Christ's lifetime in which an individual is dominated by the influence of a demon. In his ministry, Jesus Christ encountered and delivered many people in such a condition. Many of Christ's critics unsuccessfully sought to ascribe his authority and powers to demonic possession.

Unfounded accusations of demon\-possession
------------------------------------------

### Against John the Baptist

**[MAT 11:18](https://ref.ly/Matt11:18)** parallel [LUK 7:33](https://ref.ly/Luke7:33)

### Against Jesus Christ

**[JHN 10:20–10:21](https://ref.ly/John10:20-John10:21)** *See also* [MAT 9:34](https://ref.ly/Matt9:34), [MAT 12:24](https://ref.ly/Matt12:24) parallels [MRK 3:22](https://ref.ly/Mark3:22), [LUK 11:15](https://ref.ly/Luke11:15); [JHN 7:20](https://ref.ly/John7:20), [JHN 8:48–8:52](https://ref.ly/John8:48-John8:52)

### Unfounded accusations of demon\-possession against Jesus Christ are refuted

[MAT 12:25–12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:25-Matt12:28) parallels [MRK 3:23–3:30](https://ref.ly/Mark3:23-Mark3:30), [LUK 11:17–11:20](https://ref.ly/Luke11:17-Luke11:20); ; [JHN 10:21](https://ref.ly/John10:21)

Demon\-possession arising from sin
----------------------------------

**[1SA 18:9–18:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:9-1Sam18:10)**

The consequences of demon\-possession
-------------------------------------

### Irrational behaviour

**[1SA 18:10–18:11](https://ref.ly/1Sam18:10-1Sam18:11)** *See also* [1SA 19:9–19:10](https://ref.ly/1Sam19:9-1Sam19:10)

### Unnatural physical strength

**[MRK 5:4](https://ref.ly/Mark5:4)** parallels [MAT 8:28](https://ref.ly/Matt8:28), [LUK 8:29](https://ref.ly/Luke8:29) *See also* [ACT 19:16](https://ref.ly/Acts19:16)

### Self\-harm

**[MRK 5:5](https://ref.ly/Mark5:5)**

### Violent behaviour

**[MRK 9:18](https://ref.ly/Mark9:18)** parallel [LUK 9:39](https://ref.ly/Luke9:39) *See also* [MAT 8:28](https://ref.ly/Matt8:28) parallels [MRK 5:3–5:5](https://ref.ly/Mark5:3-Mark5:5), [LUK 8:27–8:29](https://ref.ly/Luke8:27-Luke8:29)

### The impairment of faculties

**[MAT 12:22](https://ref.ly/Matt12:22)** parallel [LUK 11:14](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14) *See also* [MAT 9:32](https://ref.ly/Matt9:32); [MRK 9:17](https://ref.ly/Mark9:17); [LUK 13:11](https://ref.ly/Luke13:11)

### Suffering

**[MAT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22)** parallel [MRK 7:25–7:26](https://ref.ly/Mark7:25-Mark7:26) *See also* [1SA 16:14–16:16](https://ref.ly/1Sam16:14-1Sam16:16); [MAT 17:15](https://ref.ly/Matt17:15) parallels [MRK 9:18](https://ref.ly/Mark9:18), [LUK 9:39](https://ref.ly/Luke9:39); [LUK 6:18](https://ref.ly/Luke6:18)

Jesus Christ delivers from demon\-possession
--------------------------------------------

**[MAT 8:16](https://ref.ly/Matt8:16)** parallels [MRK 1:32](https://ref.ly/Mark1:32), [LUK 4:40](https://ref.ly/Luke4:40) *See also* [MAT 4:24](https://ref.ly/Matt4:24), [MAT 9:32](https://ref.ly/Matt9:32), [MAT 12:22](https://ref.ly/Matt12:22), [MAT 15:22](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22) parallel [MRK 7:25–7:26](https://ref.ly/Mark7:25-Mark7:26)

Multiple demon\-possession
--------------------------

### Jesus Christ encounters cases of multiple demon\-possession and is able to deliver

**[MRK 16:9](https://ref.ly/Mark16:9)** *See also* [MRK 5:1–5:17](https://ref.ly/Mark5:1-Mark5:17) parallel [LUK 8:26–8:35](https://ref.ly/Luke8:26-Luke8:35); [LUK 8:2](https://ref.ly/Luke8:2)

### Further evidence of the possibility of multiple demon\-possession

[MAT 12:43–12:45](https://ref.ly/Matt12:43-Matt12:45) parallel [LUK 11:24–11:26](https://ref.ly/Luke11:24-Luke11:26)

Demons recognise divine authority and their own limited powers
--------------------------------------------------------------

**[JAS 2:19](https://ref.ly/Jas2:19)**

### Demons know Jesus Christ's identity

**[MRK 1:24](https://ref.ly/Mark1:24)** parallel [LUK 4:34](https://ref.ly/Luke4:34) *See also* [MAT 8:29](https://ref.ly/Matt8:29) parallels [MRK 5:7](https://ref.ly/Mark5:7), [LUK 8:28](https://ref.ly/Luke8:28); [MRK 1:34](https://ref.ly/Mark1:34) parallel [LUK 4:41](https://ref.ly/Luke4:41); [MRK 3:11](https://ref.ly/Mark3:11); [ACT 19:15](https://ref.ly/Acts19:15)

### Demons recognise Jesus Christ's disciples

**[ACT 16:16–16:17](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16-Acts16:17)**

### Jesus Christ's disciples have power to release from demon\-possession by calling on Jesus' name

*See also* [ACT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Acts5:16), [ACT 19:13–19:16](https://ref.ly/Acts19:13-Acts19:16)

* **Associated Passages:** Matthew 11:18; Luke 7:33; John 10:20-21; Matthew 9:34; Matthew 12:24; Mark 3:22; Luke 11:15; John 7:20; John 8:48-52; Matthew 12:25-28; Mark 3:23-30; Luke 11:17-20; John 10:21; 1 Samuel 18:9-10; 1 Samuel 18:10-11; 1 Samuel 19:9-10; Mark 5:4; Matthew 8:28; Luke 8:29; Acts 19:16; Mark 5:5; Mark 9:18; Luke 9:39; Mark 5:3-5; Luke 8:27-29; Matthew 12:22; Luke 11:14; Matthew 9:32; Mark 9:17; Luke 13:11; Matthew 15:22; Mark 7:25-26; 1 Samuel 16:14-16; Matthew 17:15; Luke 6:18; Matthew 8:16; Mark 1:32; Luke 4:40; Matthew 4:24; Mark 16:9; Mark 5:1-17; Luke 8:26-35; Luke 8:2; Matthew 12:43-45; Luke 11:24-26; James 2:19; Mark 1:24; Luke 4:34; Matthew 8:29; Mark 5:7; Luke 8:28; Mark 1:34; Luke 4:41; Mark 3:11; Acts 19:15; Acts 16:16-17; Acts 5:16; Acts 19:13-16
* **Associated Articles:** 2018: Jesus Christ, divinity of (ID: `2018@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2545: Jesus Christ, opposition to (ID: `2545@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3245: Holy Spirit, blasphemy against (ID: `3245@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4134: demons, exorcism of (id: 4134)

Jesus Christ drove out many demons during his earthly ministry and he delegated this authority to his disciples.

Jesus Christ understood exorcism as part of his ministry
--------------------------------------------------------

**[LUK 13:32](https://ref.ly/Luke13:32)** *See also* [LUK 4:18](https://ref.ly/Luke4:18)

### He drove out demons from individuals brought to him

**[MAT 8:16](https://ref.ly/Matt8:16)** parallels [MRK 1:32–1:34](https://ref.ly/Mark1:32-Mark1:34), [LUK 4:40–4:41](https://ref.ly/Luke4:40-Luke4:41) *See also* [MAT 4:24](https://ref.ly/Matt4:24)

### He drove out demons from individuals whom he encountered

**[MRK 1:23–1:26](https://ref.ly/Mark1:23-Mark1:26)** parallel [LUK 4:33–4:35](https://ref.ly/Luke4:33-Luke4:35) *See also* [MRK 1:39](https://ref.ly/Mark1:39)

Jesus Christ had power over demons
----------------------------------

### He was able to drive demons out at a distance

[MAT 15:22–15:28](https://ref.ly/Matt15:22-Matt15:28) parallel [MRK 7:25–7:30](https://ref.ly/Mark7:25-Mark7:30)

### He used words of rebuke to drive out demons

**[MAT 17:18](https://ref.ly/Matt17:18)** parallels [MRK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Mark9:25), [LUK 9:42](https://ref.ly/Luke9:42) *See also* [MRK 1:25](https://ref.ly/Mark1:25) parallel [LUK 4:35](https://ref.ly/Luke4:35); [LUK 4:41](https://ref.ly/Luke4:41)

Jesus Christ identifies the spiritual resources needed for exorcising demons
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

### The Spirit of God

[MAT 12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:28) parallel [LUK 11:20](https://ref.ly/Luke11:20)

### Faith

[MAT 17:19–17:20](https://ref.ly/Matt17:19-Matt17:20)

### Prayer (and fasting)

[MRK 9:28–9:29](https://ref.ly/Mark9:28-Mark9:29)

The ministry of exorcism was an indication of the kingdom's presence
--------------------------------------------------------------------

**[MAT 12:28](https://ref.ly/Matt12:28)** parallel [LUK 11:20](https://ref.ly/Luke11:20)

The results of being delivered from demon\-possession
-----------------------------------------------------

### Visible transformation and healing

**[MRK 5:15](https://ref.ly/Mark5:15)** parallel [LUK 8:35](https://ref.ly/Luke8:35) *See also* [MAT 9:33](https://ref.ly/Matt9:33); [LUK 11:14](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14), [LUK 13:13](https://ref.ly/Luke13:13)

### Devotion to Jesus Christ

**[LUK 8:1–8:2](https://ref.ly/Luke8:1-Luke8:2)** *See also* [MRK 5:18](https://ref.ly/Mark5:18) parallel [LUK 8:38](https://ref.ly/Luke8:38)

### Loss of supernatural faculties

[ACT 16:16–16:19](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16-Acts16:19)

### Demons seek to return

[MAT 12:43–12:45](https://ref.ly/Matt12:43-Matt12:45) parallel [LUK 11:24–11:26](https://ref.ly/Luke11:24-Luke11:26)

The impact of exorcism on those who observe it
----------------------------------------------

### Amazement

[MAT 9:33](https://ref.ly/Matt9:33), [MAT 12:23](https://ref.ly/Matt12:23); ; [MRK 1:27](https://ref.ly/Mark1:27) parallel [LUK 4:36](https://ref.ly/Luke4:36); ; [LUK 11:14](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14)

### Fear

[MAT 8:34](https://ref.ly/Matt8:34) parallels [MRK 5:17](https://ref.ly/Mark5:17), [LUK 8:37](https://ref.ly/Luke8:37)

* **Associated Passages:** Luke 13:32; Luke 4:18; Matthew 8:16; Mark 1:32-34; Luke 4:40-41; Matthew 4:24; Mark 1:23-26; Luke 4:33-35; Mark 1:39; Matthew 15:22-28; Mark 7:25-30; Matthew 17:18; Mark 9:25; Luke 9:42; Mark 1:25; Luke 4:35; Luke 4:41; Matthew 12:28; Luke 11:20; Matthew 17:19-20; Mark 9:28-29; Mark 5:15; Luke 8:35; Matthew 9:33; Luke 11:14; Luke 13:13; Luke 8:1-2; Mark 5:18; Luke 8:38; Acts 16:16-19; Matthew 12:43-45; Luke 11:24-26; Matthew 12:23; Mark 1:27; Luke 4:36; Matthew 8:34; Mark 5:17; Luke 8:37

## 4135: demons, Jesus Christ's authority over (id: 4135)

Demons are subject to the authority of Jesus Christ during his ministry and subsequently in the ministry of the church.

All spiritual powers are subject to Jesus Christ who has supreme authority
--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[EPH 1:19–1:22](https://ref.ly/Eph1:19-Eph1:22)** *See also* [ROM 8:38](https://ref.ly/Rom8:38); [EPH 3:10](https://ref.ly/Eph3:10); [COL 1:16](https://ref.ly/Col1:16), [COL 2:10](https://ref.ly/Col2:10), [COL 2:15](https://ref.ly/Col2:15)

Demons are powerless before Jesus Christ
----------------------------------------

### Demons can only do what he permits

**[MAT 8:31–8:32](https://ref.ly/Matt8:31-Matt8:32)** parallels [MRK 5:12–5:13](https://ref.ly/Mark5:12-Mark5:13), [LUK 8:32–8:33](https://ref.ly/Luke8:32-Luke8:33)

### Demons obey his command

**[MAT 17:18](https://ref.ly/Matt17:18)** parallels [MRK 9:25–9:26](https://ref.ly/Mark9:25-Mark9:26), [LUK 9:42](https://ref.ly/Luke9:42) *See also* [MAT 9:33–9:34](https://ref.ly/Matt9:33-Matt9:34); [MRK 1:34](https://ref.ly/Mark1:34), [MRK 16:9](https://ref.ly/Mark16:9); [LUK 11:14](https://ref.ly/Luke11:14)

### Demons disperse at his word

**[MRK 9:25](https://ref.ly/Mark9:25)** *See also* [MRK 1:25](https://ref.ly/Mark1:25) parallel [LUK 4:35](https://ref.ly/Luke4:35)

The name of Jesus Christ has power against demons
-------------------------------------------------

### Jesus Christ's name is used by his disciples

**[MRK 16:17](https://ref.ly/Mark16:17)** *See also* [MRK 9:38–9:39](https://ref.ly/Mark9:38-Mark9:39) parallel [LUK 9:49–9:50](https://ref.ly/Luke9:49-Luke9:50); [LUK 10:17](https://ref.ly/Luke10:17); [ACT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:18)

### Jesus Christ anticipates the misuse of his own name

**[MAT 7:22–7:23](https://ref.ly/Matt7:22-Matt7:23)** *See also* [ACT 19:13–19:16](https://ref.ly/Acts19:13-Acts19:16) *an example where Jesus' name is used in cases of demon\-possession\-\-but not by Jesus Christ's disciples, and not successfully*

Jesus Christ's disciples have delegated power over demons
---------------------------------------------------------

### In Jesus Christ's own lifetime

**[MAT 10:1](https://ref.ly/Matt10:1)** *See also* [MAT 10:7](https://ref.ly/Matt10:7); [MRK 3:14–3:15](https://ref.ly/Mark3:14-Mark3:15), [MRK 6:7](https://ref.ly/Mark6:7) parallel [LUK 9:1](https://ref.ly/Luke9:1); [MRK 6:13](https://ref.ly/Mark6:13); [LUK 10:17](https://ref.ly/Luke10:17), [LUK 10:19](https://ref.ly/Luke10:19)

### In the ongoing ministry of the church

**[MRK 16:17](https://ref.ly/Mark16:17)** *See also* [ACT 5:16](https://ref.ly/Acts5:16), [ACT 8:7](https://ref.ly/Acts8:7), [ACT 16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:18), [ACT 19:12](https://ref.ly/Acts19:12)

Others will attempt to drive out demons
---------------------------------------

[MAT 12:27](https://ref.ly/Matt12:27) parallel [LUK 11:19](https://ref.ly/Luke11:19); ; [MRK 9:38](https://ref.ly/Mark9:38) parallel [LUK 9:49](https://ref.ly/Luke9:49); ; [ACT 19:13–19:15](https://ref.ly/Acts19:13-Acts19:15)

The final punishment of demons
------------------------------

[2PE 2:4](https://ref.ly/2Pet2:4); ; [JUD 1:6](https://ref.ly/Jude1:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Ephesians 1:19-22; Romans 8:38; Ephesians 3:10; Colossians 1:16; Colossians 2:10; Colossians 2:15; Matthew 8:31-32; Mark 5:12-13; Luke 8:32-33; Matthew 17:18; Mark 9:25-26; Luke 9:42; Matthew 9:33-34; Mark 1:34; Mark 16:9; Luke 11:14; Mark 9:25; Mark 1:25; Luke 4:35; Mark 16:17; Mark 9:38-39; Luke 9:49-50; Luke 10:17; Acts 16:18; Matthew 7:22-23; Acts 19:13-16; Matthew 10:1; Matthew 10:7; Mark 3:14-15; Mark 6:7; Luke 9:1; Mark 6:13; Luke 10:19; Acts 5:16; Acts 8:7; Acts 19:12; Matthew 12:27; Luke 11:19; Mark 9:38; Luke 9:49; Acts 19:13-15; 2 Peter 2:4; Jude 1:6
* **Associated Articles:** 2012: Jesus Christ, authority of (ID: `2012@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 2372: Jesus Christ, victory of (ID: `2372@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 3275: Holy Spirit, in the church (ID: `3275@DictionaryBibleThemes`); 4127: Satan, defeat of (ID: `4127@DictionaryBibleThemes`)


## 4140: angel of the Lord (id: 4140)

A title given to those angelic servants of God who are given specific tasks in furthering God's purposes among humanity. These tasks include the giving of revelations, guidance, encouragement, warnings and the execution of judgment on those who oppose God's purposes.

The status of the angel of the Lord
-----------------------------------

### He is identified with the Lord

**[EXO 3:2–3:6](https://ref.ly/Exod3:2-Exod3:6)** *The angel of the LORD here speaks for God and is recognised as God and as a messenger from God. This may indicate that the angel speaks on God's behalf (compare with the role of the prophets) or, as some believe, this may be a manifestation of the pre\-incarnate Jesus Christ.* *See also* [GEN 16:7](https://ref.ly/Gen16:7), [GEN 16:13](https://ref.ly/Gen16:13), [GEN 31:11–31:13](https://ref.ly/Gen31:11-Gen31:13); [JDG 2:1–2:2](https://ref.ly/Judg2:1-Judg2:2), [JDG 6:11–6:12](https://ref.ly/Judg6:11-Judg6:12), [JDG 6:14](https://ref.ly/Judg6:14), [JDG 13:19–13:22](https://ref.ly/Judg13:19-Judg13:22); [ZEC 3:1–3:2](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1-Zech3:2)

### He is distinguished from the Lord

**[2SA 24:16](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:16)** parallel [1CH 21:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:15) *See also* [ZEC 1:12–1:13](https://ref.ly/Zech1:12-Zech1:13); [LUK 1:19](https://ref.ly/Luke1:19); [HEB 1:4](https://ref.ly/Heb1:4)

The angel of the Lord is active in various ways
-----------------------------------------------

### He calls and speaks

[GEN 16:7–16:8](https://ref.ly/Gen16:7-Gen16:8), [GEN 21:17](https://ref.ly/Gen21:17), [GEN 22:11](https://ref.ly/Gen22:11), [GEN 22:15](https://ref.ly/Gen22:15); ; [2KI 1:3](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:3), [2KI 1:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs1:15)

### He has physical contact with people

[1KI 19:5](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:5), [1KI 19:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:7); ; [ACT 12:7](https://ref.ly/Acts12:7)

### He appears in human likeness

[GEN 18:2](https://ref.ly/Gen18:2), [GEN 18:16](https://ref.ly/Gen18:16), [GEN 18:22](https://ref.ly/Gen18:22), [GEN 19:1](https://ref.ly/Gen19:1); ; [JDG 6:11–6:12](https://ref.ly/Judg6:11-Judg6:12); ; [ACT 27:23](https://ref.ly/Acts27:23)

### He appears in supernatural form, often evoking fear

[EXO 3:2](https://ref.ly/Exod3:2); ; [NUM 22:22–22:24](https://ref.ly/Num22:22-Num22:24), [NUM 22:31](https://ref.ly/Num22:31); ; [1CH 21:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:16); ; [LUK 1:11–1:12](https://ref.ly/Luke1:11-Luke1:12), [LUK 2:9](https://ref.ly/Luke2:9)

### He appears in dreams and visions

[GEN 31:11](https://ref.ly/Gen31:11); ; [ZEC 1:8](https://ref.ly/Zech1:8), [ZEC 1:11](https://ref.ly/Zech1:11), [ZEC 3:1](https://ref.ly/Zech3:1), [ZEC 3:5](https://ref.ly/Zech3:5); ; [MAT 2:13](https://ref.ly/Matt2:13), [MAT 2:19](https://ref.ly/Matt2:19); ; [ACT 10:3](https://ref.ly/Acts10:3)

Functions of the angel of the Lord
----------------------------------

### He reveals information, often about forthcoming births

**[JDG 13:3](https://ref.ly/Judg13:3)** *See also* [MAT 1:20](https://ref.ly/Matt1:20); [LUK 1:11](https://ref.ly/Luke1:11), [LUK 1:13](https://ref.ly/Luke1:13)

### He gives guidance and instruction

**[ACT 8:26](https://ref.ly/Acts8:26)** *See also* [GEN 16:9](https://ref.ly/Gen16:9), [GEN 22:11–22:12](https://ref.ly/Gen22:11-Gen22:12), [GEN 24:7](https://ref.ly/Gen24:7), [GEN 24:40](https://ref.ly/Gen24:40); [EXO 23:23](https://ref.ly/Exod23:23); [NUM 22:35](https://ref.ly/Num22:35)

### He comforts those in need

**[GEN 21:17](https://ref.ly/Gen21:17)** *See also* [1KI 19:5–19:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs19:5-1Kgs19:7); [ACT 27:23–27:25](https://ref.ly/Acts27:23-Acts27:25)

### He affirms promises and gives blessing

**[GEN 22:15–22:18](https://ref.ly/Gen22:15-Gen22:18)** *See also* [LUK 1:26–1:28](https://ref.ly/Luke1:26-Luke1:28), [LUK 1:30–1:33](https://ref.ly/Luke1:30-Luke1:33), [LUK 2:10–2:11](https://ref.ly/Luke2:10-Luke2:11)

### He leads, delivers and protects Israel

**[PSA 34:7](https://ref.ly/Ps34:7)** *See also* [EXO 14:19](https://ref.ly/Exod14:19); [ISA 63:9](https://ref.ly/Isa63:9)

### He rebukes sinful Israel

[JDG 2:1–2:4](https://ref.ly/Judg2:1-Judg2:4)

### He rolls back the tombstone

[MAT 28:2](https://ref.ly/Matt28:2)

### He rescues those in prison

[ACT 5:19](https://ref.ly/Acts5:19), [ACT 12:8–12:9](https://ref.ly/Acts12:8-Acts12:9)

### He executes judgment on sin

**[ACT 12:23](https://ref.ly/Acts12:23)** *See also* [2SA 24:15–24:16](https://ref.ly/2Sam24:15-2Sam24:16) parallel [1CH 21:14–21:15](https://ref.ly/1Chr21:14-1Chr21:15); [2KI 19:35](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:35) parallel [ISA 37:36](https://ref.ly/Isa37:36); [PSA 35:4–35:6](https://ref.ly/Ps35:4-Ps35:6)

* **Associated Passages:** Exodus 3:2-6; Genesis 16:7; Genesis 16:13; Genesis 31:11-13; Judges 2:1-2; Judges 6:11-12; Judges 6:14; Judges 13:19-22; Zechariah 3:1-2; 2 Samuel 24:16; 1 Chronicles 21:15; Zechariah 1:12-13; Luke 1:19; Hebrews 1:4; Genesis 16:7-8; Genesis 21:17; Genesis 22:11; Genesis 22:15; 2 Kings 1:3; 2 Kings 1:15; 1 Kings 19:5; 1 Kings 19:7; Acts 12:7; Genesis 18:2; Genesis 18:16; Genesis 18:22; Genesis 19:1; Acts 27:23; Exodus 3:2; Numbers 22:22-24; Numbers 22:31; 1 Chronicles 21:16; Luke 1:11-12; Luke 2:9; Genesis 31:11; Zechariah 1:8; Zechariah 1:11; Zechariah 3:1; Zechariah 3:5; Matthew 2:13; Matthew 2:19; Acts 10:3; Judges 13:3; Matthew 1:20; Luke 1:11; Luke 1:13; Acts 8:26; Genesis 16:9; Genesis 22:11-12; Genesis 24:7; Genesis 24:40; Exodus 23:23; Numbers 22:35; 1 Kings 19:5-7; Acts 27:23-25; Genesis 22:15-18; Luke 1:26-28; Luke 1:30-33; Luke 2:10-11; Psalms 34:7; Exodus 14:19; Isaiah 63:9; Judges 2:1-4; Matthew 28:2; Acts 5:19; Acts 12:8-9; Acts 12:23; 2 Samuel 24:15-16; 1 Chronicles 21:14-15; 2 Kings 19:35; Isaiah 37:36; Psalms 35:4-6

## 4145: archangels (id: 4145)

The archangel associated with the second coming
-----------------------------------------------

**[1TH 4:16](https://ref.ly/1Thess4:16)**

The archangel Gabriel
---------------------

### Gabriel as an interpreter of visions

**[DAN 8:15–8:26](https://ref.ly/Dan8:15-Dan8:26)** *See also* [DAN 9:20–9:27](https://ref.ly/Dan9:20-Dan9:27)

### Gabriel as a messenger of God

**[LUK 1:11–1:20](https://ref.ly/Luke1:11-Luke1:20)** *See also* [LUK 1:26–1:38](https://ref.ly/Luke1:26-Luke1:38)

## 4150: cherubim (id: 4150)

Winged, heavenly creatures represented in the tabernacle and the temple.

Description of the cherubim
---------------------------

**[EZK 10:12–10:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:12-Ezek10:14)** *See also* [EZK 1:4–1:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek1:4-Ezek1:14), [EZK 1:22–1:24](https://ref.ly/Ezek1:22-Ezek1:24), [EZK 10:5](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:5), [EZK 10:8](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:8), [EZK 10:21–10:22](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:21-Ezek10:22), [EZK 41:18–41:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:18-Ezek41:19); [REV 4:6–4:8](https://ref.ly/Rev4:6-Rev4:8)

Cherubim represented in the tabernacle and the temple
-----------------------------------------------------

### Cherubim as decorations

**[EXO 26:1](https://ref.ly/Exod26:1)** *See also* [EXO 36:8](https://ref.ly/Exod36:8); [1KI 6:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:29) parallel [2CH 3:7](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:7); [1KI 7:29](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:29), [1KI 7:36](https://ref.ly/1Kgs7:36)

### Cherubim at the entrance to the inner sanctuary

[EXO 26:31–26:33](https://ref.ly/Exod26:31-Exod26:33), [EXO 36:35](https://ref.ly/Exod36:35); ; [1KI 6:32](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:32), [1KI 6:35](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:35); ; [2CH 3:14](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:14)

### Cherubim over the ark of the covenant

**[HEB 9:5](https://ref.ly/Heb9:5)** *See also* [EXO 25:17–25:22](https://ref.ly/Exod25:17-Exod25:22), [EXO 37:7–37:9](https://ref.ly/Exod37:7-Exod37:9); [NUM 7:89](https://ref.ly/Num7:89); [1KI 6:23–6:28](https://ref.ly/1Kgs6:23-1Kgs6:28) parallel [2CH 3:10–3:13](https://ref.ly/2Chr3:10-2Chr3:13); [1KI 8:6–8:7](https://ref.ly/1Kgs8:6-1Kgs8:7) parallel [2CH 5:7–5:8](https://ref.ly/2Chr5:7-2Chr5:8); [1CH 28:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:18)

------------------------------------------------------

[EZK 41:18](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:18), [EZK 41:20](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:20), [EZK 41:25](https://ref.ly/Ezek41:25)

Cherubim represent the place of God's throne
--------------------------------------------

**[1SA 4:4](https://ref.ly/1Sam4:4)** *See also* [2SA 6:2](https://ref.ly/2Sam6:2) parallel [1CH 13:6](https://ref.ly/1Chr13:6); [2KI 19:15](https://ref.ly/2Kgs19:15) parallel [ISA 37:16](https://ref.ly/Isa37:16); [PSA 80:1](https://ref.ly/Ps80:1), [PSA 99:1](https://ref.ly/Ps99:1); [EZK 10:1](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:1); [REV 4:6](https://ref.ly/Rev4:6), [REV 5:6](https://ref.ly/Rev5:6)

Cherubim as guardians
---------------------

**[GEN 3:24](https://ref.ly/Gen3:24)** *See also* [EZK 28:14](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:14), [EZK 28:16](https://ref.ly/Ezek28:16)

Cherubim as God's chariot
-------------------------

**[2SA 22:11](https://ref.ly/2Sam22:11)** parallel [PSA 18:10](https://ref.ly/Ps18:10) *See also* [1CH 28:18](https://ref.ly/1Chr28:18)

Cherubim as agents of judgment
------------------------------

### Cherubim remove God's glory

[EZK 9:3](https://ref.ly/Ezek9:3), [EZK 10:3–10:4](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:3-Ezek10:4), [EZK 10:15–10:19](https://ref.ly/Ezek10:15-Ezek10:19), [EZK 11:22–11:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek11:22-Ezek11:23)

### God's judgment poured out

## 4155: divination (id: 4155)

Attempts to discover the unknown or the future by supernatural means, involving communication with the spirit world. It is expressly forbidden by God and has disastrous consequences.

Divination was part of early beliefs and practices
--------------------------------------------------

[GEN 41:24](https://ref.ly/Gen41:24); ; [EXO 7:11](https://ref.ly/Exod7:11); ; [ISA 31:1–31:2](https://ref.ly/Isa31:1-Isa31:2), [ISA 47:9](https://ref.ly/Isa47:9); ; [JER 27:9](https://ref.ly/Jer27:9); ; [EZK 21:21](https://ref.ly/Ezek21:21); ; [DAN 2:2](https://ref.ly/Dan2:2), [DAN 5:7](https://ref.ly/Dan5:7)

Examples of divination in NT times
----------------------------------

[ACT 8:9–8:13](https://ref.ly/Acts8:9-Acts8:13), [ACT 8:18–8:24](https://ref.ly/Acts8:18-Acts8:24), [ACT 13:6–13:12](https://ref.ly/Acts13:6-Acts13:12), [ACT 16:16–16:18](https://ref.ly/Acts16:16-Acts16:18)

The reality of a supernatural spirit world
------------------------------------------

### The spirit world is real and alluring

**[ACT 8:11](https://ref.ly/Acts8:11)** *See also* [GEN 44:5](https://ref.ly/Gen44:5), [GEN 44:15](https://ref.ly/Gen44:15); [1SA 6:2](https://ref.ly/1Sam6:2); [ACT 8:9–8:10](https://ref.ly/Acts8:9-Acts8:10)

### The spirit world is powerful and dangerous

**[2KI 9:22](https://ref.ly/2Kgs9:22)** *See also* [NUM 22:6–22:7](https://ref.ly/Num22:6-Num22:7), [NUM 22:12](https://ref.ly/Num22:12); [2KI 17:17](https://ref.ly/2Kgs17:17); [ZEC 10:2](https://ref.ly/Zech10:2); [EPH 6:12](https://ref.ly/Eph6:12); [2TH 2:9–2:10](https://ref.ly/2Thess2:9-2Thess2:10); [REV 18:23](https://ref.ly/Rev18:23)

Deliberate involvement with divination forbidden
------------------------------------------------

**[LEV 19:31](https://ref.ly/Lev19:31)** *See also* [EXO 22:18](https://ref.ly/Exod22:18); [LEV 19:26](https://ref.ly/Lev19:26); [DEU 18:10–18:14](https://ref.ly/Deut18:10-Deut18:14); [2KI 21:6](https://ref.ly/2Kgs21:6); [ISA 8:19–8:20](https://ref.ly/Isa8:19-Isa8:20); [EZK 13:23](https://ref.ly/Ezek13:23); [MIC 5:12](https://ref.ly/Mic5:12); [MAL 3:5](https://ref.ly/Mal3:5); [GAL 5:20](https://ref.ly/Gal5:20)

It is God's divine privilege to reveal or conceal things
--------------------------------------------------------

**[DEU 29:29](https://ref.ly/Deut29:29)** *See also* [PRO 25:2](https://ref.ly/Prov25:2)

Examples of the evil of divination
----------------------------------

**[1SA 28:7](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:7)** *See also* [1SA 28:3–28:15](https://ref.ly/1Sam28:3-1Sam28:15)

Casting lots to make decisions
------------------------------

Divination is clearly forbidden but some practices such as casting lots seem acceptable ways of discovering God's will in particular circumstances: [1CH 26:13–26:16](https://ref.ly/1Chr26:13-1Chr26:16); ; [NEH 11:1](https://ref.ly/Neh11:1); ; [ACT 1:26](https://ref.ly/Acts1:26)
